Text.en: Quest Complete - You have slain the Bloated Miller and received a reward from Renly.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你已击败浮肿的伐木工，并从蓝礼那里取得了任务奖励。

Text.en: Renly has offered you a reward for slaying the Bloated Miller. Take it.
Text.zh: 蓝礼为你准备了一份击败浮肿的伐木工的奖励。快去领奖吧。

Text.en: The Blacksmith appears to be in charge in this logging encampment. Talk to him.
Text.zh: 铁匠似乎是这个伐木营地的负责人。和他谈谈。

Text.en: You have slain the Bloated Miller and levelled up. Open the Passive Skill Screen and spend a Passive Skill Point to upgrade your character.
Text.zh: 你击败了浮肿的伐木工，等级也提升了。按 P 键打开天赋面板，消耗天赋点数强化你的人物。

MapPinsText.en:
Open the Passive Skill Screen
Spend your Passive Skill Point
MapPinsText.zh:
按 P 键打开天赋面板
使用天赋点强化自己

Text.en: You have slain the Bloated Miller. Enter the logging encampment.
Text.zh: 你击败了浮肿的伐木工。进入伐木营地。

Text.en: A logging encampment is under attack by a diseased monstrosity that was once human. Kill it.
Text.zh: 伐木营地正在遭受一只曾是人类的怪物的袭击。击败它。

MapPinsText.en: Kill the Bloated Miller and end his rage
MapPinsText.zh: 击败浮肿的伐木工，结束他的暴走

Text.en: The wounded man mentioned his chief Miller went to warn Clearfell about a sickness plaguing their men. Track down the Miller and find safety in Clearfell.
Text.zh: 负伤的男人提到，伐木工头前去向克里费尔传讯，警告一种荼毒着他们的疾病。追踪伐木工，找到克里费尔的安全地带。

MapPinsText.en: Search for the Miller and find safety in Clearfell
MapPinsText.zh: 寻找伐木工，找到克里费尔的安全地带

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have slain the Devourer and have received a reward from Renly.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你已击败暴噬虫，并从蓝礼那里取得了任务奖励。

Text.en: You have slain the Devourer. Talk to Renly in Clearfell for your reward.
Text.zh: 你已击败暴噬虫。在克里费尔与蓝礼交谈以领取任务奖励。

Message.en: Talk to Renly for your reward
Message.zh: 与蓝礼交谈以领取任务奖励

MapPinsText.en: Talk to Renly for your reward
MapPinsText.zh: 在克里费尔与蓝礼交谈以领取任务奖励

Text.en: You have cornered the Devourer. Kill it.
Text.zh: 你困住了暴噬虫。击败它。

Text.en: You have found the Mud Burrow. Search the tunnels for the Devourer.
Text.zh: 你找到了泥穴。在隧道里搜索暴噬虫的下落。

MapPinsText.en: Find the Devourer and slay it

Text.en: The Devourer lives underground in a Mud Burrow. Find it.
Text.zh: 暴噬虫生活在泥穴的地下。找到它。

MapPinsText.en:
Search Clearfell to find the Mud Burrow entrance
Slay the Devourer in its lair
MapPinsText.zh:
搜寻克里费尔，找到泥穴的入口
在暴噬虫的巢穴中击败它

Text.en: Find the Devourer in its Mud Burrow and slay it so that the Ezomytes can safely leave the walls of Clearfell once more.
Text.zh: 在暴噬虫的泥穴中找到并击败它，这样艾兹麦人就能再次安全地离开克里费尔的围墙了。

MapPinsText.en:
Search Clearfell for the entrance to the Mud Burrow
Slay the Devourer in its lair
MapPinsText.zh:
搜寻克里费尔，找到泥穴的入口
在暴噬虫的巢穴中击败它

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have released a dark entity called the Hooded One from the Tree of Souls.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你从灵魂之树上释放了一个被称为兜帽密师的黑暗存在。

Text.en: You have released a dark entity called the Hooded One from the Tree of Souls. Return to Clearfell Encampment and speak to Una.
Text.zh: 你从灵魂之树上释放了一个被称为兜帽密师的黑暗存在。返回克里费尔营地，与乌娜交谈。

Message.zh: 在克里费尔与乌娜见面

MapPinsText.en: Return to Clearfell Encampment and speak to Una
MapPinsText.zh: 返回克里费尔营地，与乌娜交谈

Text.en: You have released a dark entity called the Hooded One from the Tree of Souls. Speak to Una for more information.
Text.zh: 你从灵魂之树上释放了一个被称为兜帽密师的黑暗存在。与乌娜交谈，获得更多信息。

MapPinsText.en: Speak to Una about what you have just witnessed
MapPinsText.zh: 向乌娜讲述你刚才目睹的一切

Text.en: Stab each Rune Spike into the Ancient Runes on the Tree of Souls to ask it to release the Hooded One.
Text.zh: 将每一颗符文钉子刺进灵魂之树上的古代符文，令其释放兜帽密师。

MapPinsText.en: Stab the last Rune Spike into the Tree of Souls
MapPinsText.zh: 将最后的符文钉子刺进灵魂之树

Text.en: Stab each Rune Spike into the Ancient Runes on the Tree of Souls to ask it to release the Hooded One.
Text.zh: 将每一颗符文钉子刺进灵魂之树上的古代符文，令其释放兜帽密师。

MapPinsText.en: Stab the last Rune Spike into the Tree of Souls
MapPinsText.zh: 将最后的符文钉子刺进灵魂之树

Text.en: Stab each Rune Spike into the Ancient Runes on the Tree of Souls to ask it to release the Hooded One.
Text.zh: 将每一颗符文钉子刺进灵魂之树上的古代符文，令其释放兜帽密师。

MapPinsText.en: Stab the last Rune Spike into the Tree of Souls
MapPinsText.zh: 将最后的符文钉子刺进灵魂之树

Text.en: Stab each Rune Spike into the Ancient Runes on the Tree of Souls to ask it to release the Hooded One.
Text.zh: 将每一颗符文钉子刺进灵魂之树上的古代符文，令其释放兜帽密师。

MapPinsText.en: Stab the 2 remaining Rune Spikes into the Tree of Souls
MapPinsText.zh: 将剩下的两颗符文钉子刺进灵魂之树。

Text.en: Stab each Rune Spike into the Ancient Runes on the Tree of Souls to ask it to release the Hooded One.
Text.zh: 将每一颗符文钉子刺进灵魂之树上的古代符文，令其释放兜帽密师。

MapPinsText.en: Stab the 2 remaining Rune Spikes into the Tree of Souls
MapPinsText.zh: 将剩下的两颗符文钉子刺进灵魂之树。

Text.en: Stab each Rune Spike into the Ancient Runes on the Tree of Souls to ask it to release the Hooded One.
Text.zh: 将每一颗符文钉子刺进灵魂之树上的古代符文，令其释放兜帽密师。

MapPinsText.en: Stab the 2 remaining Rune Spikes into the Tree of Souls
MapPinsText.zh: 将剩下的两颗符文钉子刺进灵魂之树。

Text.en: Stab each Rune Spike into the Ancient Runes on the Tree of Souls to ask it to release the Hooded One.
Text.zh: 将每一颗符文钉子刺进灵魂之树上的古代符文，令其释放兜帽密师。

MapPinsText.en: Stab the Rune Spikes into the Tree of Souls
MapPinsText.zh: 将符文钉子刺进灵魂之树。

Text.en: You have taken the forged Rune Spikes from Renly. Return to the Grelwood with them.
Text.zh: 你从蓝礼那里拿到了锻造好的符文钉子。带着它们返回韧木森林。

MapPinsText.en: Take the forged Rune Spikes to the Hooded One in the Grelwood
MapPinsText.zh: 将锻造好的符文钉子拿给韧木森林里的兜帽密师

Text.en: Renly has forged the Runes of Power from the Red Vale into spikes. Take them from him.
Text.zh: 蓝礼将红谷的力量符文锻造成了钉子。从他那里拿走钉子。

Message.en: Take the Rune Spikes from Renly
Message.zh: 从蓝礼那里拿走符文钉子

MapPinsText.en: Take the forged Rune Spikes from Renly
MapPinsText.zh: 从克里费尔的蓝礼那里拿走锻造好的符文钉子

Text.en: You have found the Runes of Power in the Red Vale. Take them to Renly for forging.
Text.zh: 你找到了红谷的力量符文。将他们拿给蓝礼锻造。

MapPinsText.en: Bring the Runes to Renly for forging
MapPinsText.zh: 将符文带给克里费尔的蓝礼锻造

Text.en: Destroy the Rust King guarding the final Rune of Power.
Text.zh: 击败看守着最后一个力量符文的锈污之王。

MapPinsText.en: Defeat the Rust King to obtain the final Rune of Power
MapPinsText.zh: 击败锈污之王并得到最后一个力量符文

Text.en: Destroy the monsters guarding the Rune of Power.
Text.zh: 击败看守着力量符文的怪物。

MapPinsText.en: Defeat the monsters guarding the Rune of Power
MapPinsText.zh: 击败看守着力量符文的怪物

Text.en: Collect the last Rune of Power from the Obelisks of Rust in the Red Vale.
Text.zh: 从红谷的锈蚀尖碑中收集最后的力量符文

MapPinsText.en: Collect the last Rune of Power

Text.en: Collect the last Rune of Power from the Obelisks of Rust in the Red Vale.
Text.zh: 从红谷的锈蚀尖碑中收集最后的力量符文

MapPinsText.en: Collect the last Rune of Power

Text.en: Collect the last Rune of Power from the Obelisks of Rust in the Red Vale.
Text.zh: 从红谷的锈蚀尖碑中收集最后的力量符文

MapPinsText.en: Collect the last Rune of Power

Text.en: Collect the 2 remaining Runes of Power from the Obelisks of Rust in the Red Vale.
Text.zh: 从红谷的锈蚀尖碑中收集剩下的 2 个力量符文

MapPinsText.en: Collect the 2 remaining Runes of Power
MapPinsText.zh: 收集剩下的两个力量符文

Text.en: Collect the 2 remaining Runes of Power from the Obelisks of Rust in the Red Vale.
Text.zh: 从红谷的锈蚀尖碑中收集剩下的 2 个力量符文

MapPinsText.en: Collect the 2 remaining Runes of Power
MapPinsText.zh: 收集剩下的两个力量符文

Text.en: Collect the 2 remaining Runes of Power from the Obelisks of Rust in the Red Vale.
Text.zh: 从红谷的锈蚀尖碑中收集剩下的 2 个力量符文

MapPinsText.en: Collect the 2 remaining Runes of Power
MapPinsText.zh: 收集剩下的两个力量符文

Text.en: Collect all the Runes of Power in the Red Vale.
Text.zh: 收集红谷所有的力量符文。

MapPinsText.zh: 收集所有三个力量符文

Text.en: Activate the Obelisks of Rust in the Red Vale to collect the Runes of Power for the Hooded One.
Text.zh: 激活红谷的锈蚀尖碑，为兜帽密师收集力量符文。

MapPinsText.en:
Activate the Obelisks of Rust
Collect the Runes of Power
MapPinsText.zh:
激活锈蚀尖碑
收集力量符文

Text.en: The Runes of Power are clearly powerful. Collect all that the Red Vale has to offer.
Text.zh: 力量符文显然十分强大。收集红谷内所有的力量符文。

MapPinsText.en: Search for the 3 Runes of Power

Text.en: Residual magic clearly still resides in the Red Vale. Investigate the Obelisks of Rust for the Runes of Power.
Text.zh: 红谷里显然还残留着一些魔法。调查锈蚀尖碑，看看是否存在力量符文。

MapPinsText.en:
Investigate the Obelisks of Rust
Collect the Rune of Power
MapPinsText.zh:
调查锈蚀尖碑
收集力量符文

Text.en: This vale is littered with the debris of countless battles. Search it for anything that may still be useful.
Text.zh: 这片谷地散落着无数场战争的残骸。搜索红谷，看看还有没有能用的东西。

MapPinsText.en: Search the Red Vale for Obelisks of Rust containing Runes of Power
MapPinsText.zh: 搜索红谷，在锈蚀尖碑中找到力量符文

Text.en: The runes you need to release the Hooded One are somewhere in the Red Vale. Look for them.
Text.zh: 用来释放兜帽密师的符文就藏在红谷里。找到它们。

MapPinsText.en: Search the Red Vale for the 3 Runes of Power
MapPinsText.zh: 搜索红谷，找到三个力量符文

Text.en: To release the Hooded One, you must find the 3 runes in the Red Vale. Look for the Vale in the Grelwood.
Text.zh: 要想释放兜帽密师，你就必须在红谷里找到 3 个符文。在韧木森林找到红谷。

MapPinsText.en:
Find the entrance to the Red Vale
Search the Red Vale for 3 Runes of Power
MapPinsText.zh:
找到红谷的入口
搜索红谷，找到三个力量符文

Text.en: To release the Hooded One, you must find the 3 runes in the Red Vale. Look for the Red Vale in the Grelwood.
Text.zh: 要想释放兜帽密师，你就必须在红谷里找到 3 个符文。在韧木森林找到红谷。

MapPinsText.en:
Find the entrance to the Red Vale in the Grelwood
Search the Red Vale for Obelisks of Rust which contain Runes of Power
MapPinsText.zh:
在韧木森林里找到红谷的入口
搜索红谷，寻找藏有力量符文的锈蚀尖碑

Text.en: You have found the Tree of Souls. An ancient entity hangs upon it. Summon Una and ask her for advice.
Text.zh: 你找到了灵魂之树。一个古老的存在束缚其中。召唤乌娜向她寻求帮助。

MapPinsText.en: Summon Una and ask her about the entity in the Tree
MapPinsText.zh: 召唤乌娜向她询问树中的存在

Text.en: Search the Grelwood for any hint of what might have happened to the Count and his men that fateful night.
Text.zh: 搜寻韧木森林，寻找任何有关伯爵和他的手下在那个命运之夜可能发生的事情的线索。

MapPinsText.en: Search the Grelwood for evidence of the Count's activities
MapPinsText.zh: 搜寻韧木森林，寻找伯爵活动的证据

Text.en: Travel through Clearfell to the Grelwood and search for any clues about the night the Count took his men out there.
Text.zh: 穿过克里费尔前往韧木森林，寻找伯爵带手下离开那晚的任何线索。

MapPinsText.en: Travel through Clearfell to the Grelwood
MapPinsText.zh: 穿过克里费尔前往韧木森林

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have found Count Lachlann's ring and helped revive the Hooded One.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你找到了拉赫兰伯爵的戒指，并帮忙使兜帽密师复苏。

Text.en: You have given Count Lachlann's ring to Una and she is reviving the Hooded One. Witness this.
Text.zh: 你将拉赫兰伯爵的戒指交给了乌娜，她正在尝试令兜帽密师复苏。见证这一刻吧。

Message.en: Witness the revival of the Hooded One

MapPinsText.en: Witness the revival of the Hooded One

Text.en: To heal the Hooded One's runic wound, Una needs a ring from an ancient Count. Bring Count Lachlann's ring to her in Clearfell Encampment.
Text.zh: 要治愈兜帽密师的符文伤口，乌娜需要一枚古代伯爵的戒指。在克里费尔营地将拉赫兰伯爵的戒指交给她。

Message.en: Bring Count Lachlann's Ring to Una
Message.zh: 将拉赫兰伯爵的戒指交给乌娜

MapPinsText.en: Bring Count Lachlann's Ring to Una
MapPinsText.zh: 将拉赫兰伯爵的戒指交给克里费尔的乌娜

Text.en: To heal the Hooded One's runic wound, Una needs a ring from an ancient Count. Find his grave past the Memorial Gate.
Text.zh: 要治愈兜帽密师的符文伤口，乌娜需要一枚古代伯爵的戒指。穿过纪念之门，找到他的所在地。

Message.en: Search for the Count's grave past the Memorial Gate
Message.zh: 穿过纪念之门，搜寻伯爵的所在地

MapPinsText.en: Search for the Count's grave past the Memorial Gate
MapPinsText.zh: 穿过纪念之门，搜寻伯爵的所在地

Text.en: Una has helped clear the roots. Continue through the Grim Tangle.
Text.zh: 乌娜帮助清除了根须。继续穿越阴森网道。

Text.en: Speak to Una about the roots.
Text.zh: 与乌娜谈谈根须的事。

Message.en: Speak to Una about the roots

MapPinsText.en: Speak to Una about the roots

Text.en: Summon Una to ask for help clearing the roots.
Text.zh: 召唤乌娜，请她帮忙清除根须。

Message.en: Summon Una to ask for help clearing the roots
Message.zh: 召唤乌娜，请她帮忙清除根须

MapPinsText.en: Summon Una to ask for help clearing the roots
MapPinsText.zh: 召唤乌娜，请她帮忙清除根须

Text.en: Una has told you about the Count's Signet. She has instructed you to travel through the Grim Tangle in the Grelwood.
Text.zh: 乌娜告诉了你关于伯爵玺戒的事。她指示你穿越韧木森林的阴森网道。

Text.en: Una has told you about the Count's Signet. She has instructed you to travel through the Grim Tangle in the Grelwood.
Text.zh: 乌娜告诉了你关于伯爵玺戒的事。她指示你穿越韧木森林的阴森网道。

MapPinsText.en: Return to the entrance to the Grim Tangle in the Grelwood
MapPinsText.zh: 返回韧木森林的阴森网道的入口处

Text.en: Una has told you about the Count's Signet. She has instructed you to travel through the Grim Tangle in the Grelwood.
Text.zh: 乌娜告诉了你关于伯爵玺戒的事。她指示你穿越韧木森林的阴森网道。

MapPinsText.en: Find the entrance to the Grim Tangle in the Grelwood
MapPinsText.zh: 在韧木森林找到阴森网道的入口处

Text.en: You have found roots blocking the path forward through the Grim Tangle. They are impassable for now.
Text.zh: 你发现根须阻挡了通往阴森网道的道路，目前无法通行。

Message.en: The roots are impassable for now

MapPinsText.en: The roots are impassable for now

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have returned the Smithing Tools to Renly and he has restored his salvage bench to its former glory.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你为蓝礼找回了锻造工具，他也将原先的分解台修复一新。

Text.en: Bring the tools back to Renly.
Text.zh: 将这件工具带给蓝礼。

Message.en: Bring the tools back to Renly

MapPinsText.en: Bring the tools back to Renly
MapPinsText.zh: 将这件工具带给克里费尔的蓝礼

Text.en: Find Renly's tools.
Text.zh: 找到蓝礼的工具。

Text.en: Travel to Ogham Village and find Renly's tools.
Text.zh: 前往欧甘村庄，找到蓝礼的工具。

Text.en: Speak to Renly in Clearfell Encampment.
Text.zh: 与克里费尔营地的蓝礼交谈。

MapPinsText.zh: 与克里费尔的蓝礼交谈

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have returned Una's lute to her and gained two [WeaponSetPassiveSkillPoints|Weapon Set Passive Skill Points] from her reward.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你交还了乌娜的鲁特琴，并获得了 2 点[WeaponSetPassiveSkillPoints|武器组天赋点数]作为奖励。

Text.en: You have returned Una's lute to her, and she has given you a reward.
Text.zh: 你交还了乌娜的鲁特琴，她为你准备了一份奖励。

Text.en: You have returned Una's lute to her. Speak to her for your reward.
Text.zh: 你交还了乌娜的鲁特琴。跟她对话以领取任务奖励。

MapPinsText.en: Speak to Una for a reward
MapPinsText.zh: 与克里费尔的乌娜交谈以领取奖励

Text.en: You have found Una's lute. Return it to her at Clearfell Encampment.
Text.zh: 你找到了乌娜的鲁特琴。在克里费尔营地将琴交还给她。

MapPinsText.zh: 在克里费尔将乌娜的鲁特琴交还给她

Text.en: You have spotted Una's lute in her home in Ogham Farmlands. Retrieve it for her.
Text.zh: 你在欧甘农地的故居里发现了乌娜的鲁特琴。帮她取回那把琴。

Text.en: Una's lute was left behind at her home in Ogham Farmlands. Look for it.
Text.zh: 乌娜的鲁特琴被落在了欧甘农地的故居里。找到它。

MapPinsText.en: Search Ogham Farmlands for Una's Lute
MapPinsText.zh: 在欧甘农地搜寻乌娜的鲁特琴

Text.en: Una has asked you to find her lute, left behind at her home in Ogham Farmlands. Go there to look for it.
Text.zh: 乌娜请你在欧甘农地的故居里找到她弄丢的鲁特琴。去那里找找。

MapPinsText.en:
Go to Ogham Farmlands
Find Una's Lute
MapPinsText.zh:
前往欧甘农地
找到乌娜的鲁特琴

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have reunited Lachlann with his family.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你帮助拉赫兰与他的家人团聚了。

Text.en: You have reunited Lachlann with his family... but it isn't going well. Give him the rest he deserves.
Text.zh: 你帮助拉赫兰与他的家人团聚了……但情况不太对劲。让他获得应有的平静。

Text.en: You have opened the Memorial Gate. Follow Lachlann.
Text.zh: 你打开了纪念之门。跟随拉赫兰。

Text.en: You have retrieved both pieces of the Memorial Gate key. Return to the Cemetery of the Eternals and open the gate.
Text.zh: 你取回了两块纪念之门钥匙的碎块。返回永恒园林开启大门。

Message.en: Return to the Cemetery of the Eternals

MapPinsText.en: Return to the Cemetery of the Eternals and open the Memorial Gate
MapPinsText.zh: 返回永恒园林，开启纪念之门

Text.en: Pick up Asinia's Memorial Key Piece.
Text.zh: 拾取阿辛妮娅的纪念钥匙块。

Message.en: Pick up Asinia's Memorial Key Piece
Message.zh: 拾取阿辛妮娅的纪念钥匙块

MapPinsText.en: Pick up Asinia's Memorial Key Piece
MapPinsText.zh: 拾取阿辛妮娅的纪念钥匙块

Text.en: You have found Asinia, Praetor Draven's Consort. Destroy her and retrieve her piece of the Memorial Gate key.
Text.zh: 你找到了阿辛妮娅, 执政官的伴侣。击败她，取回她的纪念之门钥匙块。

MapPinsText.zh: 击败阿辛妮娅, 执政官的伴侣

Text.en: Search the Tomb of the Consort for Asinia.
Text.zh: 在伴侣寝宫中寻找阿辛妮娅。

Message.en: Explore the Tomb of the Consort

MapPinsText.en: Search for Asinia in the Tomb of the Consort
MapPinsText.zh: 在伴侣寝宫中寻找阿辛妮娅

Text.en: Search the Tomb of the Consort for Asinia.
Text.zh: 在伴侣寝宫中寻找阿辛妮娅。

Message.en: Enter the Tomb of the Consort

MapPinsText.en: Enter the Tomb of the Consort in search of Asinia
MapPinsText.zh: 进入伴侣寝宫，寻找阿辛妮娅

Text.en: You have destroyed Praetor Draven, but Asinia remains yet to be found. Search for the Tomb of the Consort.
Text.zh: 你击败了执政官德莱文，但依然需要找到阿辛妮娅。搜索伴侣寝宫。

Message.en: Return to the Cemetery of the Eternals

MapPinsText.en: Return to the Cemetery of the Eternals and search for the Tomb of the Consort
MapPinsText.zh: 返回永恒园林，寻找伴侣寝宫

Text.en: Pick up Draven's Memorial Key Piece.
Text.zh: 拾取德莱文的纪念钥匙块。

Message.en: Pick up Draven's Memorial Key Piece
Message.zh: 拾取德莱文的纪念钥匙块

MapPinsText.en: Pick up Draven's Memorial Key Piece
MapPinsText.zh: 拾取德莱文的纪念钥匙块

Text.en: You have found Praetor Draven. Destroy him and retrieve his piece of the Memorial Gate key.
Text.zh: 你找到了执政官德莱文。击败他，取回他的纪念之门钥匙块。

Text.en: Search the Mausoleum for Draven and his Consort.
Text.zh: 搜索执政官的地宫，寻找德莱文及其伴侣。

MapPinsText.en: Search the Mausoleum for Draven and his Consort
MapPinsText.zh: 搜索执政官的地宫，寻找德莱文及其伴侣

Text.en: Search the Mausoleum for Draven and his Consort.
Text.zh: 搜索执政官的地宫，寻找德莱文及其伴侣。

Text.en: You have destroyed Praetor Draven and taken his Memorial Key piece, but his consort, Asinia, has yet to be found. Return to the Cemetery of the Eternals and search for the Tomb of the Consort.
Text.zh: 你击败了执政官德莱文并取走了他的纪念钥匙块。但依然需要找到他的伴侣阿辛妮娅。返回永恒园林，找到伴侣寝宫。

Message.en: Return to the Cemetery of the Eternals

MapPinsText.en: Return to the Cemetery of the Eternals and search for the Tomb of the Consort
MapPinsText.zh: 返回永恒园林，寻找伴侣寝宫

Text.en: Pick up Draven's Memorial Key Piece.
Text.zh: 拾取德莱文的纪念钥匙块。

Message.en: Pick up Draven's Memorial Key Piece
Message.zh: 拾取德莱文的纪念钥匙块

MapPinsText.en: Pick up Draven's Memorial Key Piece
MapPinsText.zh: 拾取德莱文的纪念钥匙块

Text.en: You have found Praetor Draven. Destroy him and retrieve his piece of the Memorial Gate key.
Text.zh: 你找到了执政官德莱文。击败他，取回他的纪念之门钥匙块。

Text.en: Search the Mausoleum for Praetor Draven.
Text.zh: 搜索执政官的地宫，寻找执政官德莱文。

MapPinsText.en: Search the Mausoleum for Praetor Draven
MapPinsText.zh: 搜索执政官的地宫，寻找执政官德莱文

Text.en: Search the Mausoleum for Praetor Draven.
Text.zh: 搜索执政官的地宫，寻找执政官德莱文。

MapPinsText.en: Investigate the Mausoleum in search of Praetor Draven
MapPinsText.zh: 调查执政官的地宫，寻找执政官德莱文

Text.en: You have destroyed Asinia, but Draven remains yet to be found. Return to the Cemetery of the Eternals and search for the Mausoleum.
Text.zh: 你击败了阿辛妮娅，但依然需要找到德莱文。返回永恒园林，找到执政官的地宫。

Message.en: Return to the Cemetery of the Eternals

MapPinsText.en: Return to the Cemetery of the Eternals and search for Draven
MapPinsText.zh: 返回永恒园林，寻找德莱文

Text.en: Pick up Asinia's Memorial Key Piece.
Text.zh: 拾取阿辛妮娅的纪念钥匙块。

Message.en: Pick up Asinia's Memorial Key Piece
Message.zh: 拾取阿辛妮娅的纪念钥匙块

MapPinsText.en: Pick up Asinia's Memorial Key Piece
MapPinsText.zh: 拾取阿辛妮娅的纪念钥匙块

Text.en: You have found Asinia, Praetor Draven's Consort. Destroy her and retrieve her piece of the Memorial Gate key.
Text.zh: 你找到了阿辛妮娅, 执政官的伴侣。击败她，取回她的纪念之门钥匙块。

Text.en: Search the Tomb of the Consort for Draven and his Consort.
Text.zh: 搜索伴侣寝宫，寻找德莱文及其伴侣。

Message.en: Explore the Tomb of the Consort

MapPinsText.en: Explore the Tomb of the Consort in search of Draven and his Consort
MapPinsText.zh: 探索伴侣寝宫，寻找德莱文及其伴侣

Text.en: Search the Tomb of the Consort for Draven and his Consort.
Text.zh: 搜索伴侣寝宫，寻找德莱文及其伴侣。

Message.en: Enter the Tomb of the Consort

MapPinsText.en: Explore the Tomb of the Consort in search of Draven and his Consort
MapPinsText.zh: 探索伴侣寝宫，寻找德莱文及其伴侣

Text.en: Lachlann has asked you to help him find the keys to the Memorial gate to save his family. Find Draven and his Consort in the Tomb of the Consort and the Mausoleum.
Text.zh: 拉赫兰请你帮助他寻找纪念之门的钥匙，以便营救他的家人。在伴侣寝宫和执政官的地宫中寻找德莱文及其伴侣。

MapPinsText.en: Search the Cemetery of the Eternals for the Tomb of the Consort and the Mausoleum
MapPinsText.zh: 搜索永恒园林，寻找伴侣寝宫和执政官的地宫

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have cleansed the Ritual Altars for Finn and he has rewarded you with an Uncut Support Gem.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你已为芬恩净化了神秘雕像，并从他那里取得了一块未切割的辅助宝石。

Text.en: You have defeated the King in the Mists and cleansed the Ritual Altars in Freythorn. Speak to Finn for a reward.
Text.zh: 你在茂棘深林中击败了迷雾之王，净化了神秘雕像。与芬恩交谈以领取奖励。

Message.en: Talk to Finn for your reward
Message.zh: 与芬恩交谈以领取任务奖励

MapPinsText.en: Talk to Finn for your reward
MapPinsText.zh: 与克里费尔的芬恩交谈以领取任务奖励

Text.en: You have found the King in the Mists guarding the final Ritual Altar in Freythorn. Defeat him to cleanse the altar.
Text.zh: 你在茂棘深林中找到了看守着最后一个神秘雕像的迷雾之王。击败他并净化神秘雕像。

Message.en: Defeat the King in the Mists

MapPinsText.en: Defeat the King in the Mists

Text.en: Search for Ritual Altars in Freythorn, and cleanse them.
Text.zh: 搜索位于茂棘深林的神秘雕像，并净化它们。

MapPinsText.en: Search for Ritual Altars and cleanse them
MapPinsText.zh: 搜索驱灵祭坛，并净化它们

Text.en: Search for Freythorn above the Hunting Grounds, beyond the Graveyard.
Text.zh: 在永恒园林之外搜寻猎场上方的茂棘深林。

MapPinsText.en: Search for Freythorn above the Hunting Grounds
MapPinsText.zh: 搜寻猎场上方的茂棘深林

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have killed the Executioner and freed Leitis. You have been rewarded with an Uncut Skill Gem.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你击败了惩罚者，并解救了莱蒂斯。你获得了 1 颗未切割的技能宝石作为奖励。

Text.en: You have freed Leitis and she has returned to Clearfell. Return to Clearfell and speak to her.
Text.zh: 你解救了莱蒂斯后，她返回了克里费尔。返回克里费尔并与她交谈。

Message.zh: 在克里费尔与与莱蒂斯交谈

MapPinsText.zh: 在克里费尔与与莱蒂斯交谈

Text.en: You have freed the Executioner's prisoner. Talk to her.
Text.zh: 你解救了惩罚者的囚徒。与她交谈。

Text.en: The Executioner had an imprisoned woman nearby. Free her.
Text.zh: 惩罚者在附近囚禁了一位女性。解救她。

Text.en: You have spotted the Executioner that tried to hang you before your escape. Kill him.
Text.zh: 在你逃跑前，你发现了曾试图对你动武的惩罚者。击败他。

Text.en: You have found Ogham Village. Look for the Seed of Corruption.
Text.zh: 你找到了欧甘村庄。寻找腐化之种。

Message.en: Search for the Seed of Corruption

MapPinsText.en: Search for the Seed of Corruption

Text.en: Continue through Ogham Farmlands to look for the entrance to Ogham Village.
Text.zh: 继续穿越欧甘农地，寻找欧甘村庄的入口。

Message.en: Find the entrance to the Village

MapPinsText.en: Find the entrance to the Village

Text.en: Cut through the Hunting Grounds and find the entrance to Ogham Village.
Text.zh: 穿越猎场，寻找欧甘村庄的入口。

Message.en: Find the entrance to the Village

MapPinsText.en: Find the entrance to the Village

Text.en: Una has told you to get to the village by cutting through the Hunting Grounds. Return to the Graveyard and enter the Hunting Grounds.
Text.zh: 乌娜告诉你穿越猎场就可以进入村庄。返回永恒园林并进入猎场。

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have slain the Mad Wolf, freeing the Ezomytes from Count Geonor's reign.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你已击败疯狼，并将艾兹麦人从吉恩诺伯爵的统治下解放了出来。

Text.en: Speak to the Hooded One to travel to the Vastiri Outskirts in pursuit of Oriana and the Beast.
Text.zh: 和兜帽密师对话，前往瓦斯提里外沿，追击奥莉安娜和邪兽。

Text.en: You have slain the Mad Wolf and freed Ogham, but Oriana has escaped with the Beast. Return to town and speak to the Hooded one.
Text.zh: 你击败了疯狼并解放了欧甘，但是奥莉安娜带着邪兽逃走了。返回城镇和兜帽密师对话。

MapPinsText.en: Return to Clearfell Encampment and speak to the Hooded One
MapPinsText.zh: 返回克里费尔营地，与兜帽密师交谈

Text.en: You have finally come face to face with Count Geonor. Slay him and free Ogham.
Text.zh: 你终于要直面疯狂的吉恩诺伯爵了。击败他并解放欧甘。

Text.en: You have found the diseased heart of the Manor. Face Count Geonor.
Text.zh: 你找到了庄园的染疾之心。面对吉恩诺伯爵。

Text.en: You have spotted the Mad Wolf. Find your way into the pit below the Manor.
Text.zh: 你发现了疯狼的身影。想办法进入庄园下方的深坑。

MapPinsText.en: Find your way down beneath the Manor
MapPinsText.zh: 寻找进入庄园下方的路

Text.en: Something horrible has happened in the Manor. Fight through the madness and find Count Geonor.
Text.zh: 庄园里发生了可怕的事情。在疯狂中辟出一条道路，并找到吉恩诺伯爵。

MapPinsText.en: Search the manor for Count Geonor
MapPinsText.zh: 搜索庄园，找到吉恩诺伯爵

Text.en: Leitis has asked you to find a way into the Manor and to depose Count Geonor.
Text.zh: 莱蒂斯请求你想办法进入庄园，并废黜吉恩诺伯爵。

MapPinsText.en:
Infiltrate the Manor beyond the Village
Find Count Geonor
MapPinsText.zh:
潜入村庄之外的庄园
找到吉恩诺伯爵

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have rescued the Ardura Caravan and earned passage upon it.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你解救了阿杜拉的商队，并被准许乘坐他们的车辆同行。

Text.en: You have rescued the Ardura Caravan and earned passage upon it. Enter the Ardura Caravan.
Text.zh: 你解救了阿杜拉的商队，并被准许乘坐他们的车辆同行。进入阿杜拉的商队。

Text.en: You have defeated the Sun Clan hyenas and their leader, Rathbreaker. Return to Zarka and give her the news.
Text.zh: 你击败了烈日部族土狼及其领袖摧寨魔。将这个消息告诉扎卡。

Text.en: You have found the Sun Clan leader, Rathbreaker. Defeat him.
Text.zh: 你找到了烈日部族的首领摧寨魔，击败他。

Text.en: The Maraketh Caravan cannot travel while hyenic raiders are harassing the trade route. Find them and destroy them.
Text.zh: 只要土狼劫掠者正在骚扰商路，马拉克斯商队就无法前行。找到劫掠者并捣毁他们。

MapPinsText.en: Find the Hyenic Raiders and destroy them
MapPinsText.zh: 找到土狼劫掠者并击败他们

Text.en: The Hooded One believes the Maraketh will lend aid in pursuit of the Seed of Corruption. Find a caravan on the nearby trade route.
Text.zh: 兜帽密师相信马拉克斯人对寻找腐化之种有所帮助。在附近的贸易路线上找到一支商队。

MapPinsText.en: Speak to someone in charge at the caravan

Text.en: Speak to the Hooded One concerning what to do next.
Text.zh: 和兜帽密师谈谈接下来怎么办。

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have pursued the Beast across the Vastiri Outskirts and defeated Jamanra, the Abomination in combat.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你追逐邪兽穿越了瓦斯提里外沿，并在战斗中击败了亚曼拉，厌恶之躯。

Text.en: The lost empire of the Vaal may hold ancient knowledge that will aid in containing the Beast. Talk to Asala to travel south. The Maraketh will bring you to the Sandswept Marsh.
Text.zh: 失落的瓦尔帝国或许埋藏着远古的知识，能够协助我们扼制邪兽。与艾萨拉对话，并前往南方。马拉克斯人会将你带往飞沙沼泽。

Message.en: Talk to Asala to travel south to the Sandswept Marsh
Message.zh: 与艾萨拉交谈，前往南方的飞沙沼泽

MapPinsText.en: Talk to Asala to travel south to the Sandswept Marsh
MapPinsText.zh: 与艾萨拉交谈，前往南方的飞沙沼泽

Text.en: The Countess escaped with the Beast once again. Speak to the Hooded One for further clarity on what to do next. He can be found in a shrine to the northwest of the caravan, that you must travel to on foot.
Text.zh: 伯爵夫人再一次带着邪兽逃脱了。与兜帽密师交谈，理清接下来怎么办。他就在商队西北部的一处殿堂中，但你只能步行前往那里。

Message.en: Head down a ramp northwest of the Caravan's midpoint
Message.zh: 沿着中央商队西北侧的斜坡向下走

MapPinsText.en: Use a ramp to the northwest of the Caravan's midpoint to find the Hooded One
MapPinsText.zh: 使用中央商队西北侧的斜坡，找到兜帽密师

Text.en: The Countess escaped with the Beast once again. Speak to the Hooded One for further clarity on what to do next. He can be found in a shrine to the northwest of the caravan, that you must travel to on foot.
Text.zh: 伯爵夫人再一次带着邪兽逃脱了。与兜帽密师交谈，理清接下来怎么办。他就在商队西北部的一处殿堂中，但你只能步行前往那里。

Message.en: Speak to the Hooded One in the Shrine to the Northwest
Message.zh: 和西北部的殿堂中的兜帽密师谈谈接下来怎么办

MapPinsText.en: Speak to the Hooded One in the Shrine to the Northwest of the Caravan
MapPinsText.zh: 和商队西北部的殿堂中的兜帽密师谈谈接下来怎么办

Text.en: Defeat Jamanra, the Abomination in combat.
Text.zh: 在战斗中击败亚曼拉, 厌恶之躯。

Message.zh: 击败亚曼拉, 厌恶之躯

MapPinsText.zh: 击败亚曼拉, 厌恶之躯

Text.en: According to Risu, the Beast is kept in a cage behind Jamanra, the Abomination's throne. Fight your way there.
Text.zh: 据里苏所说，邪兽被关押在亚曼拉, 厌恶之躯的王座后的笼子里。闯出一条道路。

Message.en: Fight your way to the the Throne
Message.zh: 闯出一条血路并抵达王座

MapPinsText.en: Fight your way to Jamanra, the Abomination's throne
MapPinsText.zh: 闯出一条血路并抵达亚曼拉, 厌恶之躯的王座

Text.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to the Dreadnought.
Text.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往无畏战车。

Message.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to the Dreadnought
Message.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往无畏战车

MapPinsText.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to the Dreadnought
MapPinsText.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往无畏战车

Text.en: The Ardura have finally caught up to the Faridun. Speak to Asala to learn about the final battle.
Text.zh: 阿杜拉人终于追上了法里顿人。与艾萨拉交谈，了解最终的决战。

Text.en: The Faridun have escaped with the Beast. Defeat Tor Gul, the Defiler, so that you may continue pursuing them.
Text.zh: 法里顿人带着邪兽逃离了。击败托古尔，污染者，你才能继续追击。

Text.en: Defeat Jamanra, the Abomination atop Deshar.
Text.zh: 在德莎尔顶端击败亚曼拉, 厌恶之躯。

Message.zh: 击败亚曼拉, 厌恶之躯

MapPinsText.zh: 击败亚曼拉, 厌恶之躯

Text.en: The Faridun are atop Deshar. Find their King and confront him.
Text.zh: 法里顿人登上了德莎尔的顶端。找到他们的国王并正面交锋。

Message.zh: 击败亚曼拉, 厌恶之躯

MapPinsText.zh: 击败亚曼拉, 厌恶之躯

Text.en: The Faridun may already be feeding the Honoured Dead to the Beast. Travel through the Path of Mourning and confront them.
Text.zh: 法里顿人可能已经在壮大邪兽的力量了。穿越怀念之阶，与他们正面交锋。

Message.en: Travel through the Path of Mourning

MapPinsText.en: Travel through the Path of Mourning

Text.en: The Faridun may already be feeding the Honoured Dead to the Beast. Ascend Deshar and confront them.
Text.zh: 法里顿人可能已经在壮大邪兽的力量了。登上德莎尔，与他们正面交锋。

Text.en: The Faridun may already be feeding the Honoured Dead at the Maraketh Burial Spires to the Beast. Use the Desert Map to travel there and confront them.
Text.zh: 法里顿人可能已经在马拉克斯的德莎尔中壮大邪兽的力量了。使用荒漠地图前往那里，与他们正面交锋。

Message.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Deshar
Message.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往德莎尔

MapPinsText.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Deshar
MapPinsText.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往德莎尔

Text.en: You have sounded the Horn of the Vastiri and dispelled Jamanra, the Risen King's sandstorm. Speak to Asala.
Text.zh: 你吹响了瓦斯提里号角，驱散了亚曼拉, 复生之王的沙暴。与艾萨拉交谈。

Text.en: You have returned to the Sandstorm. Use the Horn of the Vastiri to dispel it.
Text.zh: 你回到了沙暴之中。使用瓦斯提里号角驱散它。

Message.en: Use the Horn of the Vastiri

MapPinsText.en: Use the Horn of the Vastiri to clear the Sandstorm
MapPinsText.zh: 使用瓦斯提里号角，清除沙暴。

Text.en: You and Zarka have recreated the Horn of the Vastiri. Use the Desert Map to return to the Sandstorm to dispel it.
Text.zh: 你和扎卡重新制作了瓦斯提里号角。使用荒漠地图回到沙暴处驱散它。

Message.en: Use the Desert Map to return to the Sandstorm
Message.zh: 使用荒漠地图返回沙暴处

MapPinsText.en: Use the Desert Map to return to the Sandstorm at the Halani Gates
MapPinsText.zh: 使用荒漠地图返回哈拉尼之门的沙暴处

Text.en: You have provided everything required to recreate the Horn of the Vastiri. Speak to Zarka to obtain it.
Text.zh: 你提供了重新制作瓦斯提里号角所需的一切。与扎卡交谈并获取它。

Message.en: Take the Horn of the Vastiri

MapPinsText.en: Return to Zarka to obtain the Horn of the Vastiri
MapPinsText.zh: 回到扎卡处取得瓦斯提里号角

Text.en: Zarka has determined that only recreating the Horn of the Vastiri will serve to dispel Jamanra, the Risen King's sandstorm. Retrace the legendary Orbala's footsteps to make a Horn of your own.
Text.zh: 扎卡已经决定，只有重新制作瓦斯提里号角，才能驱散亚曼拉, 复生之王的沙尘暴。追寻传奇的欧巴拉的足迹，打造属于自己的号角。

Message.en: Recreate the Horn of the Vastiri
Message.zh: 重新制作瓦斯提里号角

MapPinsText.en: Retrace the legendary Orbala's path to recreate the Horn of the Vastiri
MapPinsText.zh: 追寻传奇欧巴拉的足迹，重铸瓦斯提里号角

Text.en: Zarka has determined that only recreating the Horn of the Vastiri will serve to dispel Jamanra, the Risen King's sandstorm. Speak to Asala to learn about Orbala's footsteps.
Text.zh: 扎卡已经决定，只有重新制作瓦斯提里号角，才能驱散亚曼拉, 复生之王的沙尘暴。与艾萨拉交谈，了解欧巴拉的足迹。

MapPinsText.en: Speak to Asala to learn about Orbala's footsteps
MapPinsText.zh: 与商队的艾萨拉交谈，了解欧巴拉的足迹

Text.en: You have found a desert sandstorm that is blocking the path forward. Return to the caravan and speak to Zarka to find out how to proceed.
Text.zh: 你发现一股沙暴阻拦了前进的道路。返回商队，与扎卡交谈，并找出前进之法。

MapPinsText.en: Return to the Caravan and speak to Zarka
MapPinsText.zh: 返回商队，并与扎卡交谈。

Text.en: A Corrupted leader known as Jamanra, the Risen King has united the Faridun and attacked the Maraketh. Help Asala defeat him.
Text.zh: 被称为亚曼拉, 复生之王的腐化领袖统一了法里顿人，并对马拉克斯人展开了袭击。帮助艾萨拉击败他。

Message.zh: 击败亚曼拉, 复生之王

MapPinsText.en: Help Asala slay the Corrupted leader of the Faridun
MapPinsText.zh: 帮助艾萨拉击败法里顿人的腐化领袖

Text.en: The third Gate mechanism has been destroyed. Fight your way forward.
Text.zh: 第三个雄关装置被摧毁了。闯出一条路，继续前进。

Text.en: The Ardura Maraketh have run into some trouble. Assist Sekhema Asala in fighting the enemy and opening the Gates.
Text.zh: 阿杜拉的马拉克斯人遇到麻烦了。协助丝克玛艾萨拉与敌人战斗，打开关门。

MapPinsText.en: Fight your way to the third Gate and open it
MapPinsText.zh: 闯出一条道路，抵达第三扇关门并打开它

Text.en: The Ardura Maraketh have run into some trouble. Assist Sekhema Asala in fighting the enemy and opening the Gates.
Text.zh: 阿杜拉的马拉克斯人遇到麻烦了。协助丝克玛艾萨拉与敌人战斗，打开关门。

MapPinsText.en: Fight your way to the second Gate and open it
MapPinsText.zh: 闯出一条道路，抵达第二扇关门并打开它

Text.en: The Ardura Maraketh have run into some trouble. Assist Sekhema Asala in fighting the enemy and opening the Gates.
Text.zh: 阿杜拉的马拉克斯人遇到麻烦了。协助丝克玛艾萨拉与敌人战斗，打开上古之门。

Message.en: Assist Asala in opening the Gates

MapPinsText.en: Find a way to open the Gates with Asala
MapPinsText.zh: 和艾萨拉找到打开关门的方法

Text.en: Risu, a defector of the Faridun, has informed you of a way to the top of the gates. Ascend Traitor's Passage to reach them.
Text.zh: 法里顿的叛逃者，里苏告诉了你一条通往关门顶端的路。登上叛徒小径即可到达。

MapPinsText.en: Ascend Traitor's Passage to reach the top of the Gates
MapPinsText.zh: 登上叛徒小径以抵达关门顶端

Text.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Traitor's Passage.
Text.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往叛徒小径。

Message.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Traitor's Passage
Message.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往叛徒小径

MapPinsText.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Traitor's Passage
MapPinsText.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往叛徒小径

Text.en: Talk to Asala about Risu's information.
Text.zh: 与艾萨拉探讨里苏提供的情报。

Message.en: Talk to Asala about Risu's information
Message.zh: 与艾萨拉探讨里苏提供的情报

MapPinsText.en: Talk to Asala about Risu's information
MapPinsText.zh: 与商队的艾萨拉探讨里苏提供的情报

Text.en: Return to town and talk to Risu about the locked Halani Gates.
Text.zh: 返回城镇，与里苏谈谈被封锁的哈拉尼之门。

Message.en: Talk to Risu about the closed Gates
Message.zh: 与里苏谈谈关闭的关门。

MapPinsText.en: Return to the caravan and talk to Risu about the closed Gates
MapPinsText.zh: 返回商队，与里苏谈谈封锁的关门。

Text.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to the Halani Gates.
Text.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往哈拉尼之门。

Message.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to the Halani Gates
Message.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往哈拉尼之门

MapPinsText.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to the Halani Gates
MapPinsText.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往哈拉尼之门

Text.en: Return to town and find Asala at the lead cart to question the Defector about Jamanra, the Risen King's destinations.
Text.zh: 返回城镇并在领头车中找到艾萨拉，审问叛逃者，找到亚曼拉, 复生之王的目的地。

Message.en: Return to the Caravan with the Defector
Message.zh: 和叛逃者一起返回商队

MapPinsText.en: Return to the Caravan's lead cart to question the Defector there
MapPinsText.zh: 返回商队领头车，在那里审问叛逃者

Text.en: You have found a Faridun defector. Question her.
Text.zh: 你发现了一名法里顿叛逃者。审问她。

Text.en: Destroy Rudja, Dread Engineer.
Text.zh: 击败鲁贾, 恐怖工程师。

Message.zh: 击败鲁贾, 恐怖工程师

MapPinsText.zh: 击败鲁贾, 恐怖工程师

Text.en: You have discovered a foundry run by the Faridun, which now seems to be abandoned. Investigate it.
Text.zh: 你发现了一个法里顿人经营的铸造厂，现在似乎已经废弃。对其进行调查。

Text.en: Enter Mawdun Mine and continue your search for the Beast.
Text.zh: 进入莫丹矿场，继续寻找邪兽。

Text.en: Explore Mawdun Quarry in your search for the Beast.
Text.zh: 探索莫丹采石场，寻找邪兽。

Text.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Mawdun Quarry in search of the Faridun, who may have closed the Halani Gates.
Text.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往莫丹采石场，寻找可能关闭了哈拉尼之门的法里顿人。

Message.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Mawdun Quarry
Message.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往莫丹采石场

MapPinsText.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Mawdun Quarry
MapPinsText.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往莫丹采石场

Text.en: The Halani Gates are unexpectedly closed. Ask Asala what to do next.
Text.zh: 哈拉尼之门意外关闭了。问问艾萨拉下一步该怎么做。

MapPinsText.en: Talk to Asala about the closed Gates
MapPinsText.zh: 与商队的艾萨拉谈谈紧闭的关门

Text.en: Scouts have reported Corruption in two areas. Use the Desert Map to travel to either in search of the Beast.
Text.zh: 斥候报告有两个区域出现了腐化的迹象。使用荒漠地图，前往其中一个地区寻找邪兽。

MapPinsText.en: Travel with the Ardura Caravan to areas of reported Corruption
MapPinsText.zh: 与阿杜拉的商队同行，前往报告发现腐化的地方

Text.en: Consult with Asala to learn more about the Beast.
Text.zh: 询问艾萨拉，进一步了解邪兽

MapPinsText.en: Consult with Asala about the Beast

Text.en: The Hooded One believes the Ardura will aid in the pursuit of the Seed of Corruption. Speak with the Sekhema to request their support.
Text.zh: 兜帽密师相信阿杜拉人对寻找腐化之种有所帮助。与丝克玛交谈，请求他们的帮助。

MapPinsText.en: Talk to the Sekhema of the Ardura
MapPinsText.zh: 与阿杜拉的丝克玛交谈

Text.en: You have boarded the Ardura Caravan. Speak to the Hooded One for information on what your next move should be.
Text.zh: 你登上了阿杜拉的商队。与兜帽密师交谈，了解下一步行动。

Text.en: Quest Complete - The Flame Ruby has been retrieved from the Titan Grotto and given to Zarka.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你已从巨人石窟里取回了火焰红玉并交给了扎卡。

Text.en: Zarka has offered you a reward for defeating Zalmarath, the Colossus. Take it.
Text.zh: 扎卡为你准备了一份礼物，奖励你击败了扎尔马拉斯, 神威巨像。快去领奖吧。

MapPinsText.en: Zarka has offered you a reward for defeating Zalmarath, the Colossus
MapPinsText.zh: 扎卡为你准备了一份礼物，奖励你击败了扎尔马拉斯, 神威巨像。

Text.en: Take the Flame Ruby to the Ardura Caravan. Zarka will know what to do with it.
Text.zh: 将火焰红玉带回阿杜拉的商队。扎卡知道该怎么做。

Message.en: Take the Flame Ruby to town

MapPinsText.en: Give the Flame Ruby to Zarka

Text.en: You have defeated Zalmarath, the Colossus and it has dropped a Flame Ruby. Pick it up.
Text.zh: 你击败了扎尔马拉斯, 神威巨像，它掉落了一颗火焰红玉。快把它捡起来。

Text.en: You have found the altar and invoked the Rite of Flame. Defeat Zalmarath, the Colossus to prove yourself.
Text.zh: 你找到了平台并举行了烈焰仪式。击败扎尔马拉斯, 神威巨像来证明自己。

Message.zh: 击败扎尔马拉斯, 神威巨像

MapPinsText.en: Defeat Zalmarath, the Colossus and retrieve the Flame Ruby
MapPinsText.zh: 击败扎尔马拉斯, 神威巨像，并取回火焰红玉

Text.en: You must invoke the Rite of Flame at a cerulean altar. Find it.
Text.zh: 你必须在一处靛蓝的平台上举行烈焰仪式。找到它。

Message.en: Search for the Rite of Flame altar

MapPinsText.en: Search for the Rite of Flame altar somewhere in the Titan Grotto
MapPinsText.zh: 搜寻位于巨人石窟某处的烈焰仪式平台

Text.en: You have opened the way into the Titan Grotto. Enter it.
Text.zh: 你打通了通往巨人石窟的路。进入里面。

Message.en: Enter the Titan Grotto at the Clasped Entry
Message.zh: 穿过紧扣的入口，进入巨人石窟

MapPinsText.en: Enter the Titan Grotto at the Clasped Entry
MapPinsText.zh: 穿过紧扣的入口，进入巨人石窟

Text.en: Find and activate additional Ancient Seals.
Text.zh: 找到并激活更多的古代封印。

Message.en: Find and activate additional Ancient Seals
Message.zh: 找到并激活更多的古代封印

MapPinsText.en: Find and activate additional Ancient Seals
MapPinsText.zh: 找到并激活更多的古代封印

Text.en: According to Maraketh knowledge of the Third Pact, there is some way under Valley of the Titans. Find it.
Text.zh: 根据马拉克斯对第三盟约的了解，巨人之谷下有一条路。找到它。

Message.en: Find a way into the Titan Grotto
Message.zh: 找到进入巨人石窟的方法

MapPinsText.en: Find a way to access the Titan Grotto beneath Valley of the Titans
MapPinsText.zh: 找到进入巨人之谷下方的巨人石窟的方法

Text.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Valley of the Titans.
Text.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往巨人之谷。

Message.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Valley of the Titans
Message.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往巨人之谷

MapPinsText.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Valley of the Titans
MapPinsText.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往巨人之谷

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have found the Essence of Water at the heart of Keth.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你在克斯之心找到了水之精华。

Text.en: Zarka has offered you a reward for bringing back the Essence of Water.
Text.zh: 扎卡为你准备了一份礼物，奖励你将水之精华带了回来。

MapPinsText.en: Take the reward for returning the Essence of Water
MapPinsText.zh: 领取交还水之精华的奖励

Text.en: You have burned the Water Goddess alive at her request. Return to the Ardura Caravan.
Text.zh: 你应水之女神的要求点燃了火焰。回到阿杜拉的商队。

MapPinsText.en: Return to the Ardura Caravan and talk to Zarka
MapPinsText.zh: 返回阿杜拉的商队，与扎卡交谈

Text.en: Pick up the Essence of Water.
Text.zh: 拾取水之精华。

Message.en: Pick up the Essence of Water

MapPinsText.en: Pick up the Essence of Water

Text.en: You have used the Everburning Cinders to put the Water Goddess to rest. She will soon be at peace.
Text.zh: 你使用了永燃余烬让水之女神安息。她的痛苦很快就会结束。

Message.en: Witness the Water Goddess being put to rest

MapPinsText.en: Witness the Water Goddess being put to rest

Text.en: The Water Goddess has requested you end her suffering. Use the nearby Everburning Cinders to grant her request.
Text.zh: 水之女神请求你结束她的痛苦。使用附近的永燃余烬来完成她的请求。

MapPinsText.en: Use the Everburning Cinders to let the Water Goddess rest
MapPinsText.zh: 使用永燃余烬来使水之女神安息

Text.en: There is a Water Goddess lying in a shrine at the heart of Keth. Talk to her to see if you can render aid.
Text.zh: 水之女神躺在克斯之心的大厅里。与她交谈，看看是否可以提供帮助。

MapPinsText.en: Speak with the Water Goddess to see if you can render aid
MapPinsText.zh: 跟水之女神谈谈，看看是否可以提供帮助

Text.en: Destroy Azarian, the Forsaken Son to access the shrine that supposedly holds the Essence of Water.
Text.zh: 击败阿扎瑞安, 忘却之子，进入据说藏有水之精华的大厅。

Message.zh: 击败阿扎瑞安, 忘却之子

MapPinsText.en: Destroy Azarian, the Forsaken Son to gain access to the Essence of Water
MapPinsText.zh: 击败阿扎瑞安, 忘却之子，以接近水之精华

Text.en: According to Zarka, the Essence of Water was kept in a shrine at the center of Keth Sanctum. Find it.
Text.zh: 根据扎卡的说法，水之精华被保存在克斯密殿的一个大厅里。找到它。

Message.en: Search for the Essence of Water

MapPinsText.en: Find the Essence of Water somewhere in Keth Sanctum
MapPinsText.zh: 在克斯密殿里找到水之精华

Text.en: According to Zarka, the Essence of Water can be found in a Sanctum at the heart of Keth. Find it.
Text.zh: 根据扎卡的说法，水之精华被保存在克斯之心的一个密殿里。找到它。

MapPinsText.en: Find the Sanctum at the heart of Keth

Text.en: Keth has been buried by centuries of shifting sands. Find a way to access the city proper.
Text.zh: 克斯已经在奔流的沙海之下掩埋了数百年之久。找到进入城市的方法。

MapPinsText.en: Find the entrance to Keth buried somewhere in the sands
MapPinsText.zh: 找到掩埋在沙漠中的克斯入口

Text.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Keth.
Text.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往克斯。

Message.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Keth
Message.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往克斯

MapPinsText.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to Keth
MapPinsText.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往克斯

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have returned the Mastodon Tusks to the Ardura for safekeeping.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你将长毛象獠牙交还给阿杜拉人来保管。

Text.en: Zarka is offering you a reward for the securing the Mastodon Tusks. Take it.
Text.zh: 扎卡为你准备了一份礼物，奖励你拯救了长毛象獠牙。领取它。

MapPinsText.en: Take the reward for the Mastodon Tusks from Zarka
MapPinsText.zh: 从扎卡处领取拯救了长毛象獠牙的奖励

Text.en: Return to the Ardura Caravan and give the Mastodon Tusks to Zarka for safekeeping.
Text.zh: 返回阿杜拉的商队，将长毛象獠牙交给扎卡来保管。

MapPinsText.en: Return to the Ardura Caravan and talk to Zarka
MapPinsText.zh: 返回阿杜拉的商队，与扎卡交谈

Text.en: You have defeated Ekbab, Ancient Steed. Retrieve the Mastodon Tusks.
Text.zh: 你已击败伊科巴, 先古战驹。拯救长毛象獠牙。

Text.en: Ekbab, Ancient Steed is a guardian of the Mastodon Tusks. He is assisted by Iktab, the Deathlord. Destroy them both and retrieve the Tusks.
Text.zh: 伊科巴, 先古战驹是长毛象獠牙的守护者，伊克塔布, 黑色主宰则在一旁助阵。击败他们两个并拯救獠牙。

Message.en: Defeat Ekbab, Ancient Steed and Iktab, the Deathlord
Message.zh: 击败伊科巴, 先古战驹和伊克塔布, 黑色主宰

MapPinsText.en: Defeat Ekbab, Ancient Steed and Iktab, the Deathlord, then retrieve the Tusks
MapPinsText.zh: 击败伊科巴, 先古战驹和伊克塔布, 黑色主宰，并拯救獠牙

Text.en: The Mastodon Tusks are somewhere in the Bone Pits. Find them.
Text.zh: 长毛象獠牙就在遗迹深坑的某处，找到它们。

Message.en: Search the Bone Pits for the Mastodon Tusks
Message.zh: 搜索遗迹深坑，寻找长毛象獠牙

MapPinsText.en: Search the Bone Pits for the Mastodon Tusks
MapPinsText.zh: 搜索遗迹深坑，寻找长毛象獠牙

Text.en: Jamanra, the Risen King seeks to retrieve powerful Mastodon Tusks that may grant him and his minions lightning abilities. Search the Mastodon Badlands to find the entrance to the Bone Pits.
Text.zh: 亚曼拉, 复生之王想要得到强大的长毛象獠牙，这些獠牙可以赐予他和他的爪牙们掌控闪电的能力。搜索长毛象荒原，寻找遗迹深坑的入口。

Message.en: Search for the entrance to the Bone Pits

MapPinsText.en: Search the Mastodon Badlands for the entrance to the Bone Pits
MapPinsText.zh: 搜索长毛象荒原，寻找遗迹深坑的入口

Text.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to the Mastodon Badlands.
Text.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往长毛象荒原。

Message.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to the Mastodon Badlands
Message.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往长毛象荒原

MapPinsText.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to the Mastodon Badlands
MapPinsText.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往长毛象荒原

Text.en: Quest Complete - You searched Deshar and found a final letter. Shambrin burned it without reading it, but intends to secretly remember the person that wrote it.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你搜索了德莎尔并找到了一封遗书。岑柏琳没有阅读遗书就把它烧掉了，但她打算默默怀念写下遗书的人。

Text.en: You have returned the final letter to Shambrin and she has given you a Book of Specialisation.
Text.zh: 你将遗书交还给岑柏琳后，她给了你 1 本专精之书

Text.en: You have returned the final letter to Shambrin. Speak to her for your reward.
Text.zh: 你将遗书交还给岑柏琳。跟她对话以领取任务奖励。

Text.en: You found a recent corpse and a final letter that has no named recipient. Return it to Shambrin.
Text.zh: 你找到了一个刚死不久的人，以及一封没有收件人姓名的遗书。将它交还给岑柏琳。

MapPinsText.en: Return the Final Letter to Shambrin

Text.en: Shambrin has asked you to search for the possible corpse of someone she cared about. Check the base of each tower.
Text.zh: 岑柏琳请求你搜寻她所关心的人可能留下的遗体。检查每座高塔的底部。

Message.en: Search for evidence of Lailuma's fate
Message.zh: 搜寻有关莱露玛命运的线索

MapPinsText.en: Find Lailuma's body somewhere in Deshar
MapPinsText.zh: 在德莎尔内找到莱露玛

Text.en: Shambrin has asked you to travel to Deshar and search for the possible corpse of someone she cared about.
Text.zh: 岑柏琳请求你前往德莎尔，并搜寻她所关心的人。

Text.en: You found a final letter that has no named recipient. Return to the Ardura Caravan and ask about it.
Text.zh: 你找到了一封没有收件人姓名的遗书。返回阿杜拉的商队，和他们谈谈。

MapPinsText.en: Return the letter to someone in the Ardura Caravan
MapPinsText.zh: 将信件交还给阿杜拉商队的某人

Text.en: An abandoned rhoa you passed on the way into Deshar indicates that someone Maraketh may have run into trouble here.
Text.zh: 你在前往德莎尔的路上遇到了一只被遗弃的恐喙鸟，这表明可能有马拉克斯人在这里遇到了麻烦。

MapPinsText.en: Look for the owner of the abandoned rhoa in Deshar
MapPinsText.zh: 在德莎尔里找到被遗弃的恐喙鸟的主人

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have inserted the Sun Clan and Kabala Clan Relics and can now choose to side with one of the Clans and receive a permanent reward.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你插入了烈日部族和卡芭菈部族的圣物，现在可以选择支持其中一个部族，并获得永久奖励。

Text.en: Insert the Sun Clan Relic.
Text.zh: 插入烈日部族遗物。

Text.en: Insert the Kabala Clan Relic.
Text.zh: 插入卡芭菈部族遗物。

Text.en: You have found something that looks like it would hold the Relics. Insert them.
Text.zh: 你找到了一个看起来能容纳遗物的东西。插入它们。

Text.en: You have found two mysterious Relics. Find a use for them.
Text.zh: 你发现了两件神秘的遗物。找到它们的用途。

Message.en: Find a use for the Relics

MapPinsText.en: Find a use for the Relics

Text.en: You have found a mysterious Relic. Find a use for it.
Text.zh: 你发现了一件神秘的遗物。找到它的用途。

Message.en: Find a use for the Relic

MapPinsText.en: Find a use for the Relic

Text.en: You have placed one Relic into the altar but it looks like it can hold one more. Find it.
Text.zh: 你将一件遗物放入了盟誓之台，但似乎还能再放一件。找到它。

MapPinsText.en: Find another Relic that can be placed in the altar
MapPinsText.zh: 找到另一件可以放入盟誓之台的遗物

Text.en: Place the Relic in the altar that you found.
Text.zh: 将你找到的遗物放入盟誓之台。

Message.en: Place the Relic in the altar that you found
Message.zh: 将你找到的遗物放入盟誓之台

MapPinsText.en: Place the Relic in the altar that you found
MapPinsText.zh: 将你找到的遗物放入盟誓之台

Text.en: Find something that can be placed in the altar.
Text.zh: 找到可以放入盟誓之台的东西。

Message.en: Find something that can be placed in the altar
Message.zh: 找到可以放入盟誓之台的东西

MapPinsText.en: Find something that can be placed in the altar
MapPinsText.zh: 找到可以放入盟誓之台的东西

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have completed the Trial of the Sekhemas and have chosen an Ascendancy as a reward.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你通过了丝克玛试炼，并选择了一个升华职业作为奖励。

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have completed the Trial of the Sekhemas and have obtained Ascendancy Passive Points as a reward.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你通过了丝克玛试炼，并获得了升华点数作为奖励。

Text.en: Use the Altar of Ascendancy to obtain Ascendancy Passive Skill Points.
Text.zh: 使用升华之殿，获取升华点数。

Message.en: Use the Altar of Ascendancy to obtain Ascendancy Passive Skill Points
Message.zh: 使用升华之殿，获取升华点数

MapPinsText.en: Use the Altar of Ascendancy to obtain Ascendancy Passive Skill Points
MapPinsText.zh: 使用升华之殿，获取升华点数

Text.en: Use the Altar of Ascendancy to choose your Ascendancy.
Text.zh: 使用升华之殿，选择升华职业。

Message.en: Use the Altar of Ascendancy to choose your Ascendancy
Message.zh: 使用升华之殿，选择升华职业

MapPinsText.en: Use the Altar of Ascendancy to choose your Ascendancy
MapPinsText.zh: 使用升华之殿，选择升华职业

Text.en: Defeat Rattlecage, the Earthbreaker.
Text.zh: 击败惊响囚笼, 裂地之灵。

Message.zh: 击败惊响囚笼, 裂地之灵

MapPinsText.zh: 击败惊响囚笼, 裂地之灵

Text.en: Complete the Trial of the Sekhemas.
Text.zh: 完成丝克玛试炼。

Message.en: Complete the Trial of the Sekhemas

MapPinsText.en: Complete the Trial of the Sekhemas

Text.en: Begin your Test of Strength.
Text.zh: 开始力量测试。

Text.en: Place your Key into the Relic Altar to begin the Trial of the Sekhemas.
Text.zh: 将钥匙放在遗物之殿上，开启丝克玛试炼。

MapPinsText.en: Use the Relic Altar to start the Trial
MapPinsText.zh: 使用遗物之殿开启试炼

Text.en: Speak to Balbala, the Released.
Text.zh: 与贝尔巴拉, 解脱者交谈。

MapPinsText.zh: 与贝尔巴拉, 解脱者交谈

Text.en: You have found the Relic Altar. Place your Barya into it.
Text.zh: 你找到了遗物之殿。将你的硬币放进去。

Message.en: Place your Barya into the Relic Altar
Message.zh: 将硬币放在遗物之殿上

MapPinsText.en: Place your Barya into the Relic Altar
MapPinsText.zh: 将硬币放在遗物之殿上

Text.en: Find a Relic Altar in the Trial of the Sekhemas to place your Barya into.
Text.zh: 在丝克玛试炼中寻找能够放入硬币的遗物之殿。

MapPinsText.en: Find a Relic Altar to place your Barya into
MapPinsText.zh: 寻找能够放入硬币的遗物之殿

Text.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to the Trial of the Sekhemas.
Text.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往丝克玛试炼。

Message.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to the Trial of the Sekhemas
Message.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往丝克玛试炼

MapPinsText.en: Use the Desert Map to travel to the Trial of the Sekhemas
MapPinsText.zh: 使用荒漠地图前往丝克玛试炼

Text.en: Return to the Ardura Caravan and speak to Zarka about what you have just found.
Text.zh: 返回阿杜拉的商队，与扎卡交谈，了解你刚才的发现。

MapPinsText.en: Return to the Ardura Caravan and speak to Zarka
MapPinsText.zh: 返回阿杜拉的商队，与扎卡交谈

Text.en: Return to the Ardura Caravan and speak to Zarka about what you have just found.
Text.zh: 返回阿杜拉的商队，和扎卡谈谈，了解你刚才的发现。

MapPinsText.en: Return to the Ardura Caravan and speak to Zarka
MapPinsText.zh: 返回阿杜拉的商队，与扎卡交谈

Text.en: Obtain another Balbala's Barya.
Text.zh: 获取另一个贝尔巴拉的巨灵币。

Message.zh: 获取另一个贝尔巴拉的巨灵币

MapPinsText.zh: 获取另一个贝尔巴拉的巨灵币

Text.en: The Ardura Maraketh have run into some trouble. Assist Sekhema Asala in fighting the enemy and opening the Gates.
Text.zh: 阿杜拉的马拉克斯人遇到麻烦了。协助丝克玛艾萨拉与敌人战斗，打开哈拉尼之门。

Message.en: Assist Asala in opening the Gates
Message.zh: 帮助艾萨拉打开哈拉尼之门

MapPinsText.en: Find a way to open the Gates with Asala
MapPinsText.zh: 和艾萨拉找到打开哈拉尼之门的方法

Text.en: The Ardura Maraketh have run into some trouble. Assist Sekhema Asala in fighting the enemy and opening the Gates.
Text.zh: 阿杜拉的马拉克斯人遇到麻烦了。协助丝克玛艾萨拉与敌人战斗，打开哈拉尼之门。

Message.en: Assist Asala in opening the Gates
Message.zh: 帮助艾萨拉打开哈拉尼之门

MapPinsText.en: Find a way to open the Gates with Asala
MapPinsText.zh: 和艾萨拉找到打开哈拉尼之门的方法

Text.en: The Ardura Maraketh have run into some trouble. Assist Sekhema Asala in fighting the enemy and opening the Gates.
Text.zh: 阿杜拉的马拉克斯人遇到麻烦了。协助丝克玛艾萨拉与敌人战斗，打开哈拉尼之门。

Message.en: Assist Asala in opening the Gates
Message.zh: 帮助艾萨拉打开哈拉尼之门

MapPinsText.en: Find a way to open the Gates with Asala
MapPinsText.zh: 和艾萨拉找到打开哈拉尼之门的方法

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have captured the foremost Vaal expert on the Beast, and brought him to the present to aid you now.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你抓获了邪兽领域的顶级瓦尔专家，并将他带到现代来帮助你。

Text.en: You have captured the foremost Vaal expert on the Beast, and brought him to the present to aid you now. Speak to Alva to travel with her and Doryani to Kingsmarch.
Text.zh: 你抓获了邪兽领域的顶级瓦尔专家，并将他带到现代来帮助你。与阿尔瓦交谈并和多里亚尼一同前往君锋镇。

MapPinsText.en: Speak to Alva to travel to Kingsmarch
MapPinsText.zh: 与阿尔瓦交谈前往君锋镇

Text.en: Speak to Alva.
Text.zh: 与阿尔瓦交谈。

Text.en: Speak to Doryani.
Text.zh: 与多里亚尼交谈。

Text.en: Use the Gateway in the Ziggurat Encampment to travel to the Present.
Text.zh: 使用金字塔营地的传送门前往现代。

MapPinsText.en: Use the Gateway to travel to the Present

Text.en: Survive the Cataclysm.
Text.zh: 在灾变中幸存。

Text.en: Use the Gateway in the Ziggurat Encampment to travel to the Past.
Text.zh: 使用金字塔营地的传送门前往过去。

MapPinsText.en: Use the Gateway to travel to the Past

Text.en: Speak to Doryani in Ziggurat Encampment.
Text.zh: 与金字塔营地的多里亚尼交谈。

Message.en: Speak to Doryani in Ziggurat Encampment
Message.zh: 与金字塔营地的多里亚尼交谈

MapPinsText.en: Speak to Doryani in Ziggurat Encampment
MapPinsText.zh: 与金字塔营地的多里亚尼交谈

Text.en: Doryani was the Vaal's foremost expert on the Beast and corruption. Capture him, so that you may interrogate him.
Text.zh: 多里亚尼是研究邪兽和腐化的顶级瓦尔专家。抓住他以审问他。

MapPinsText.en: Capture Doryani for his knowledge of the Beast
MapPinsText.zh: 抓获多里亚尼，寻求有关邪兽的知识

Text.en: Doryani was the Vaal's foremost expert on the Beast and corruption. Find him and free Alva.
Text.zh: 多里亚尼是研究邪兽和腐化的顶级瓦尔专家。找到他并救出阿尔瓦。

Message.en: Find Doryani in the Black Chambers
Message.zh: 在暗胧殿堂中找到多里亚尼

MapPinsText.en: Find Doryani in the Black Chambers
MapPinsText.zh: 在暗胧殿堂中找到多里亚尼

Text.en: Fight your way through Aggorat and find the Black Chambers to free Alva.
Text.zh: 突破阿戈拉特，寻找暗胧殿堂并救出阿尔瓦。

MapPinsText.en: Fight through Aggorat and find the Black Chambers
MapPinsText.zh: 突破阿戈拉特，寻找暗胧殿堂

Text.en: You have found Aggorat. Enter it and seek out the Black Chambers to free Alva.
Text.zh: 你找到了阿戈拉特。深入其中，寻找暗胧殿堂并救出阿尔瓦。

MapPinsText.en: Enter Aggorat and search for the Black Chambers
MapPinsText.zh: 进入阿戈拉特，寻找暗胧殿堂

Text.en: Alva has been taken to Aggorat. Find her before it's too late.
Text.zh: 阿尔瓦被带到了阿戈拉特。趁着还来得及，快找到她。

MapPinsText.zh: 从多里亚尼处营救阿尔瓦

Text.en: Viper Napuatzi has had Alva taken to Doryani. Defeat Viper Napuatzi to open the path forward and free Alva.
Text.zh: 蝰蛇娜帕齐将阿尔瓦带到了多里亚尼身边。击败蝰蛇娜帕齐，打通道路并营救阿尔瓦。

Text.en: You have somehow traveled to the past! You are no longer looking for an ancient repository. Search for knowledge about the Beast from the living Vaal themselves.
Text.zh: 你意外穿越回了过去！你不再需要寻找古老的知识宝库，直接向活生生的瓦尔人探求关于邪兽的知识吧。

MapPinsText.en: Search Utzaal for knowledge about the Beast
MapPinsText.zh: 搜索乌扎尔，找到有关邪兽的知识

Text.en: You have entered the Time Portal and have been taken back in time. Enter Utzaal.
Text.zh: 你进入了时空传送门，并被带回了遥远的过去。进入乌扎尔。

Text.en: Enter the Time Portal to go back in time to the past.
Text.zh: 进入时空传送门，返回遥远的过去。

Text.en: Alva has activated an elevator that appears to go up into Ziggurat Encampment. Ride it up.
Text.zh: 阿尔瓦激活的升降机似乎能够直达金字塔营地顶部。乘上去。

Text.en: Speak to Alva about the significance of this chamber.
Text.zh: 与阿尔瓦交谈，了解这间密室的意义。

Text.en: Alva may have an interest in what happened in the Temple of Kopec. Summon her and let her know.
Text.zh: 阿尔瓦可能对科佩克之殿中的情况感兴趣。召唤并告知她。

MapPinsText.en: Summon Alva and tell her what happened
MapPinsText.zh: 召唤阿尔瓦并告知发生的情况

Text.en: Defeat Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun.
Text.zh: 击败卡阿祖尔, 烈阳先师。

Message.en: Defeat Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun
Message.zh: 击败卡阿祖尔, 烈阳先师

MapPinsText.en: Defeat Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun
MapPinsText.zh: 击败卡阿祖尔, 烈阳先师

Text.en: You have finally gained access to the Temple of Kopec. Explore it in search of the Vaal repository of knowledge.
Text.zh: 你终于可以进入科佩克之殿了。探索这里，搜寻瓦尔知识宝库。

MapPinsText.en: Explore the Temple of Kopec in search of the Vaal repository of knowledge
MapPinsText.zh: 探索科佩克之殿，搜寻瓦尔知识宝库

Text.en: You have used the key to open the entrance to the Temple of Kopec. Enter it and seek out the Vaal repository of knowledge.
Text.zh: 你使用钥匙打开了科佩克之殿的入口。进入其中，寻找瓦尔知识宝库。

MapPinsText.en: Enter the Temple of Kopec underneath the treasure hunter encampment
MapPinsText.zh: 进入寻宝者营地下方的科佩克之殿

Text.en: You have shown the Temple Door Idol to Alva. She wants you to open the door to the Temple of Kopec.
Text.zh: 你向阿尔瓦出示了金字塔大门雕像。她希望你能打开科佩克之殿的大门。

Message.en: Open the door to the Temple of Kopec
Message.zh: 打开科佩克之殿的大门

MapPinsText.en: Open the door to the Temple of Kopec
MapPinsText.zh: 打开科佩克之殿的大门

Text.en: You have found a key to the Temple of Kopec underneath the treasure hunter encampment. Open the door and enter it.
Text.zh: 你找到了寻宝者营地下方的科佩克之殿的钥匙。打开门并进入其中。

Message.en: Return to Alva with the Temple Door Idol
Message.zh: 带着金字塔大门雕像返回阿尔瓦处

MapPinsText.en: Return to Alva with the Temple Door Idol
MapPinsText.zh: 带着金字塔大门雕像返回阿尔瓦处

Text.en: You have defeated the Queen of Filth and she has dropped a Temple Door Idol. It looks like it would fit into the door to the Temple of the Sun God. Pick it up.
Text.zh: 你击败了污秽女王，她留下了一个金字塔大门雕像，似乎能够嵌入太阳殿堂的大门中。捡起它。

Message.en: Pick up the Temple Door Idol

MapPinsText.en: Pick up the Temple Door Idol

Text.en: You have found the Queen of Filth. Defeat her as she may contain the key you are looking for.
Text.zh: 你找到了污秽女王。击败她，她或许携带着你所寻找的钥匙。

Text.en: Explore Aggorat in search of a key to unlock the entrance to the Temple of the Sun God.
Text.zh: 探索阿戈拉特，寻找能够打开太阳殿堂入口的钥匙。

MapPinsText.en: Explore the Apex of Filth and search for a key
MapPinsText.zh: 探索污秽巅峰并寻找钥匙

Text.en: You have found the entrance to Aggorat. Enter it and seek out a key to unlock the entrance to the Temple of the Sun God.
Text.zh: 你发现了阿戈拉特的入口。进入其中，寻找能够打开太阳殿堂入口的钥匙。

MapPinsText.en: Enter the Apex of Filth and search for a key
MapPinsText.zh: 进入污秽巅峰并寻找钥匙

Text.en: The entrance to the Temple of the Sun God is locked. Search for a key in the Aggorat beyond The Drowned City.
Text.zh: 太阳殿堂的入口已被封锁。前往淹没之城更远处的阿戈拉特寻找钥匙。

MapPinsText.en: Explore The Drowned City and search for Aggorat
MapPinsText.zh: 探索淹没之城，寻找阿戈拉特

Text.en: The entrance to the Temple of the Sun God is locked. Search for a key in the Aggorat beyond The Drowned City.
Text.zh: 太阳殿堂的入口已被封锁。前往淹没之城更远处的阿戈拉特寻找钥匙。

MapPinsText.en: Enter The Drowned City and search for Aggorat
MapPinsText.zh: 进入淹没之城，寻找阿戈拉特

Text.en: You have lowered the water and revealed the Sunken City of Utzaal. Return to town and go down the southwestern stairs to enter it.
Text.zh: 你降低了水位，使沉沦之城乌扎尔重见天日。返回城镇，从西南方向的楼梯进入沉沦之城。

MapPinsText.en: Return to the Encampment and find Alva at the base of the Ziggurat
MapPinsText.zh: 返回营地，在金字塔底部找到阿尔瓦

Text.en: You have gained access to The Matlan Waterways. Find the control mechanisms and drain the area.
Text.zh: 你可以进入马特兰水道了。找到控制装置并排干该区域的积水。

MapPinsText.en: Find the control mechanisms and activate The Matlan Waterways to drain the area
MapPinsText.zh: 找到控制装置，启动马特兰水道以排干区域

Text.en: You have gained access to The Matlan Waterways. Enter the area, find the control mechanisms and drain the area.
Text.zh: 你可以进入马特兰水道了。进入该区域，找到控制装置并排干积水。

MapPinsText.en: Enter The Matlan Waterways and find the control mechanisms
MapPinsText.zh: 进入马特兰水道，寻找控制装置

Text.en: You have retrieved the large Soul Core. Return to Jungle Ruins and activate the Stone Altar to gain passage to The Matlan Waterways.
Text.zh: 你已取回大灵核。返回丛林废墟，启动石阵以打开通往马特兰水道的通路。

MapPinsText.en: Return to Jungle Ruins and activate the Stone Altar
MapPinsText.zh: 返回丛林废墟，并启动石阵

Text.en: You have defeated Zicoatl, Warden of the Core. Pick up the Large Soul Core.
Text.zh: 你击败了吉柯塔尔，护核卫士。捡起大灵核。

Message.en: Pick up the Large Soul Core

MapPinsText.en: Pick up the Large Soul Core

Text.en: Defeat Zicoatl, Warden of the Core to obtain the Large Soul Core.
Text.zh: 击败吉柯塔尔，护核卫士，并获取大灵核。

MapPinsText.en: Defeat Zicoatl, Warden of the Core
MapPinsText.zh: 击败吉柯塔尔, 护核卫士

Text.en: The Large Soul Core near Alva is now retrievable. Collect it.
Text.zh: 阿尔瓦附近的大灵核现在可以取回了，去收集它。

MapPinsText.en: Retrieve the Large Soul Core near Alva
MapPinsText.zh: 取回阿尔瓦附近的大灵核

Text.en: To retrieve the large Soul Core you need, Alva has advised you that you must find two medium Soul Cores and use them to activate two Generators in Jiquani's Sanctum.
Text.zh: 为了取回你需要的大灵核，阿尔瓦认为你必须找到两个中灵核，并用它们来启动佳华尼的密殿中的两个发电机。

MapPinsText.en: Search Jiquani's Sanctum for two medium Soul Cores and use them to activate two Generators
MapPinsText.zh: 搜索佳华尼的密殿，找到两个中灵核，并用它们来启动两个发电机。

Text.en: You've found a mysterious symbol on the floor. Speak to Alva to learn more about what is going on here.
Text.zh: 你在地上发现了一个神秘的符号，与阿尔瓦交谈，了解这里的情况。

Text.en: You've found a mysterious symbol on the floor. Summon Alva to learn more about what is going on here.
Text.zh: 你在地上发现了一个神秘的符号，召唤阿尔瓦，了解这里的情况。

MapPinsText.en: Summon Alva and speak to her
MapPinsText.zh: 召唤阿尔瓦并与她谈谈

Text.en: You have found Jiquani's Sanctum. Explore it in search of the large Soul Core.
Text.zh: 你找到了佳华尼的密殿。探索区域，寻找大灵核。

Text.en: You have found a small Soul Core and opened the door of the Machinarium. Proceed deeper into the ruin.
Text.zh: 你找到了一个小灵核并打开了机械迷城的大门。深入这片废墟。

Text.en: You have found a small Soul Core. Take it to the Stone Altar to proceed deeper into the ruin.
Text.zh: 你找到了一个小灵核。将它带到石阵，以进入废墟深处。

MapPinsText.en: Place the small Soul Core into the Stone Altar

Text.en: Your way is blocked by a massive stone door. The operating mechanism requires a small Soul Core. Find one in the vicinity.
Text.zh: 一扇巨大的石门阻挡了你的道路。控制装置需要一个小灵核。在附近找一个。

Message.en: Search for a small Soul Core

MapPinsText.en: Search Jiquani's Machinarium for a small Soul Core to open the Door
MapPinsText.zh: 搜索佳华尼的机械迷城，找到一个小灵核来打开这扇门

Text.en: You have discovered another stone altar. Ask Alva for advice about how to activate it.
Text.zh: 你发现了另一个石阵，向阿尔瓦打听如何启动它。

Text.en: You have discovered another stone altar. Summon Alva for advice about how to activate it.
Text.zh: 你发现了另一个石阵，召唤阿尔瓦，了解如何启动它。

MapPinsText.en: Summon Alva to ask her for advice
MapPinsText.zh: 召唤阿尔瓦，寻求她的建议

Text.en: You have found an ancient Vaal facility. Search within for a large Soul Core.
Text.zh: 你找到了一座古老的瓦尔设施。在里面搜寻一个大灵核。

Message.en: Search for a large Soul Core

MapPinsText.en: Search the Machinarium for a large Soul Core
MapPinsText.zh: 搜索机械迷城，找到一个大灵核

Text.en: You have defeated the Machinarium's guardian chimera. Enter the facility.
Text.zh: 你已击败机械迷城的奇美拉守卫。进入该设施。

Message.zh: 进入佳华尼的机械迷城

MapPinsText.zh: 进入佳华尼的机械迷城

Text.en: A massive beast seems to be guarding the entrance to the Machinarium. Defeat it.
Text.zh: 一头巨大的魔物似乎正在守卫机械迷城的入口。击败它。

Message.zh: 击败奇美拉赛克鲁西安

MapPinsText.zh: 击败赛克鲁西安, 奇美拉

Text.en: Servi has told you the tale of a ruin where a large Soul Core might be found. Search for the Machinarium within the Chimeral Wetlands.
Text.zh: 塞尔维告诉了你关于一片废墟的传说，在那里或许能找到一个大灵核。在幻缈湿地里搜寻机械迷城。

MapPinsText.en: Traverse the Chimeral Wetlands in search of the ancient Machinarium
MapPinsText.zh: 穿过幻缈湿地，搜寻古老的机械迷城

Text.en: Servi has told you the tale of a ruin where a large Soul Core might be found. Find the Chimeral Wetlands, and cross it in search of the Machinarium.
Text.zh: 塞尔维告诉了你关于一片废墟的传说，在那里或许能找到一个大灵核。找到幻缈湿地，穿过它并搜寻幻机械迷城。

MapPinsText.en: Explore Infested Barrens in search of the Chimeral Wetlands
MapPinsText.zh: 探索滋孽荒原，搜寻幻缈湿地

Text.en: The stone altar in Infested Barrens requires a large Soul Core for power. Ask Servi if she or her tribe know where one might be found.
Text.zh: 滋孽荒原的石阵需要一个大灵核才能驱动。询问塞尔维，看看她或者她的部落是否知道哪里能找到这样的灵核。

MapPinsText.en: Ask Servi for more information about Soul Cores
MapPinsText.zh: 询问塞尔维以获得更多关于灵核的信息

Text.en: You have discovered a stone altar that seems to be a control mechanism for a canal. Ask Alva for advice on this ancient mechanism.
Text.zh: 你找到了一个石阵，它似乎是一条运河的控制装置。向阿尔瓦请教关于这个古老装置的建议。

Text.en: You have discovered a stone altar that seems to be a control mechanism for a canal. Summon Alva to ask her for advice on this ancient mechanism.
Text.zh: 你找到了一个石阵，它似乎是一条运河的控制装置。召唤阿尔瓦，向她寻求有关这个古老装置的建议。

MapPinsText.en: Summon Alva to ask her for advice
MapPinsText.zh: 召唤阿尔瓦，寻求她的建议

Text.en: Somewhere in the region are canals that could potentially be used to lower the water and reveal the city. Find The Matlan Waterways.
Text.zh: 该地区的运河或许可以用来降低水位，让城市重见天日。找到马特兰水道。

MapPinsText.en: Explore beyond the Jungle Ruins in search of The Matlan Waterways
MapPinsText.zh: 探索丛林废墟，寻找马特兰水道

Text.en: Somewhere in the region are canals that could potentially be used to lower the water and reveal the city. Find The Matlan Waterways.
Text.zh: 该地区的运河或许可以用来降低水位，让城市重见天日。找到马特兰水道。

MapPinsText.en: Enter the Jungle Ruins to search for The Matlan Waterways
MapPinsText.zh: 进入丛林废墟，寻找马特兰水道

Text.en: The Sunken City of Utzaal appears to live up to its name. Ask the Hooded One about potentially lowering the water to reveal the city.
Text.zh: 沉沦之城乌扎尔似乎名副其实。询问兜帽密师可能降低水位的方法，让这座城市重见天日。

MapPinsText.en: Ask the Hooded One about lowering the water level
MapPinsText.zh: 询问兜帽密师降低水位的方法

Text.en: The Sunken City of Utzaal appears to live up to its name. Ask the Hooded One about potentially lowering the water to reveal the city.
Text.zh: 沉沦之城乌扎尔似乎名副其实。询问兜帽密师可能降低水位的方法，让这座城市重见天日。

MapPinsText.en: Ask the Hooded One about lowering the water level
MapPinsText.zh: 询问兜帽密师降低水位的方法

Text.en: You have found a group of treasure hunters already camped on a ziggurat in the middle of a lake. Explore their camp to find out more.
Text.zh: 你发现一队寻宝者早已在湖中心的一座塔庙上扎营了。探索他们的营地，了解更多情况。

Text.en: Only one seat of Vaal civilisation remains unlooted: the Sunken City of Utzaal. Explore the Sandswept Marsh in search of its most prominent Ziggurat.
Text.zh: 世间唯有一座瓦尔文明之都尚未遭到洗劫：沉沦之城乌扎尔。探索飞沙沼泽，寻找其中最显眼的塔庙。

MapPinsText.en: Cross the Sandswept Marsh in search of a Ziggurat
MapPinsText.zh: 穿越飞沙沼泽，寻找一座塔庙

Text.en: Speak to the Hooded One about what do to next.
Text.zh: 和兜帽密师谈谈接下来怎么办。

MapPinsText.en: Speak to the Hooded One about what to do next
MapPinsText.zh: 和兜帽密师谈谈接下来怎么办

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have found a venom vial in the The Venom Crypts and Servi has rewarded you.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你在蛇毒地窟找到了一个毒液瓶，并从塞尔维那里取得了任务奖励。

Text.en: Consume the Venom Draught that Servi made for you.
Text.zh: 使用赛尔维为你制作的剧毒饮剂。

Text.en: Consume the Venom Draught that Servi made for you.
Text.zh: 使用赛尔维为你制作的蛇毒饮剂。

Text.en: Consume the Venom Draught that Servi made for you.
Text.zh: 使用赛尔维为你制作的剧毒饮剂。

Text.en: Take a Venom Draught from Servi.
Text.zh: 从塞尔维处获取蛇毒饮剂。

Text.en: Return to Servi and ask her about the venom vial you found.
Text.zh: 返回塞尔维身边，询问她关于你找到的这个毒液瓶的事情。

Text.en: Pick up the Corpse-snake Venom you found in The Venom Crypts.
Text.zh: 拾取你在蛇毒地窟找到的骸蛇毒液。

Text.en: You have discovered a corpse in The Venom Crypts. Search it.
Text.zh: 你在蛇毒地窟发现了一个倒下的人，搜索它。

Text.en: Servi may find uses for materials found in The Venom Crypts. Explore it in search of something useful.
Text.zh: 塞尔维也许能将蛇毒地窟里找到的材料派上用场。探索蛇毒地窟，搜索有用的东西。

Text.en: Servi has told you about the Orok. Search for the source of their poison.
Text.zh: 塞尔维向你讲述了奥洛克人的情况。寻找他们毒素的来源。

Message.en: Find the source of the Orok poison
Message.zh: 寻找奥洛克人毒素的来源

MapPinsText.en: Find the source of the Orok poison
MapPinsText.zh: 寻找奥洛克人毒素的来源

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have slain Ignagduk, the Bog Witch and have been rewarded with a Flask.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你击败了伊格纳杜克, 沼泽老妪，并获得了一瓶药剂作为奖励。

Text.en: Take the Reward from Servi.
Text.zh: 领取塞尔维的奖励。

Text.en: You have slain Ignagduk, the Bog Witch and freed the spirits of the children she stole. Talk to Servi and tell her the good news.
Text.zh: 你击败了伊格纳杜克, 沼泽老妪，并解放了被她偷走的人。与塞尔维交谈，告诉她这个好消息。

MapPinsText.en: Return to town and talk to Servi
MapPinsText.zh: 返回城镇，与塞尔维交谈

Text.en: Ignagduk's Ghastly Spear would serve well as proof that you've killed her. Pick it up.
Text.zh: 伊格纳杜克的丧魂矛会证明你已经击败了她。把它捡起来。

Message.zh: 捡起伊格纳杜克的丧魂矛

MapPinsText.zh: 捡起伊格纳杜克的丧魂矛

Text.en: You have found Ignagduk, the Bog Witch. Slay her and free the spirits of the children she has stolen.
Text.zh: 你找到了伊格纳杜克, 沼泽老妪。击败她，并解放被她偷走的人。

Text.en: Servi has asked you to enter the Azak Village and slay Ignagduk, the Bog Witch and free the spirits of her tribe's stolen children.
Text.zh: 塞尔维请求你进去阿扎卡村庄，击败伊格纳杜克, 沼泽老妪，并解放她部落中被偷走的孩子们的灵魂。

MapPinsText.en: Find Ignagduk in the Azak village and slay her
MapPinsText.zh: 在阿扎卡村庄里找到伊格纳杜克并击败她

Text.en: Servi has asked you to slay Ignagduk, the Bog Witch and free the spirits of her tribe's stolen children. Search for the Azak Village beyond the Waterways.
Text.zh: 塞尔维请求你击败伊格纳杜克, 沼泽老妪，并解放她部落中被偷走的孩子们的灵魂。穿过危机水道，寻找阿扎卡村庄。

MapPinsText.en: Find the village of the Azak tribe beyond the Waterways
MapPinsText.zh: 穿过危机水道，寻找阿扎卡村庄

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have delivered The Hammer of Kamasa to Oswald and have been rewarded with an Uncut Skill Gem, Artificer's Orb, Gold and access to the Reforging Bench.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你将卡马萨之锤交给了奥斯瓦尔德，获得了一块未切割的技能宝石、巧匠石、一些金币，并解锁了重铸台。

Text.en: The Hammer of Kamasa could be of interest to Oswald. Bring it back to him in Ziggurat Encampment.
Text.zh: 奥斯瓦尔德可能对卡马萨之锤感兴趣。返回金字塔营地将锤子交给他。

Message.en: Bring The Hammer of Kamasa to Oswald in Ziggurat Encampment
Message.zh: 将卡马萨之锤交给金字塔营地的奥斯瓦尔德

MapPinsText.en: Bring The Hammer of Kamasa to Oswald in Ziggurat Encampment
MapPinsText.zh: 将卡马萨之锤交给金字塔营地的奥斯瓦尔德

Text.en: You have defeated the Forgemaster. Return to Ziggurat Encampment and speak to Oswald.
Text.zh: 你已击败了锻造大师。返回金字塔营地并与奥斯瓦尔德交谈

Message.en: Speak to Oswald in Ziggurat Encampment
Message.zh: 与金字塔营地的奥斯瓦尔德交谈

MapPinsText.en: Speak to Oswald in Ziggurat Encampment
MapPinsText.zh: 与金字塔营地的奥斯瓦尔德交谈

Text.en: The Forgemaster has dropped a Hammer. This could be of interest to Oswald. Pick it up and bring it back to Oswald in Ziggurat Encampment.
Text.zh: 锻造大师留下了一把锤子。奥斯瓦尔德可能会感兴趣。捡起锤子，将它交给金字塔营地的奥斯瓦尔德。

Message.en: Pick up The Hammer of Kamasa

MapPinsText.en: Pick up The Hammer of Kamasa

Text.en: You have encountered the forgemaster, Mektul. Defeat him.
Text.zh: 你遭遇了锻造大师梅克图尔。击败他。

Message.zh: 击败梅克图尔, 锻造大师

MapPinsText.zh: 击败梅克图尔, 锻造大师

Text.en: You have entered The Molten Vault. Clear it out in search of riches.
Text.zh: 你进入了熔火宝库。清理这片区域以寻找宝物。

Text.en: Oswald wants you to enter The Molten Vault and clear it out, looking for riches while you do so.
Text.zh: 奥斯瓦尔德希望你能够进入并清理熔火宝库。与此同时，别忘记寻找宝物。

Text.en: Speak to Oswald about the monkey statues.
Text.zh: 与奥斯瓦尔德交谈，了解猴子雕像。

Text.en: You have spotted the monkey statues that Oswald spoke about just ahead. Summon Oswald and give him the news.
Text.zh: 你在前方不远处发现了奥斯瓦尔德提到过的猴子雕像。召唤奥斯瓦尔德，将消息告诉他。

MapPinsText.en: Summon Oswald and speak to him about the monkey statues you have spotted
MapPinsText.zh: 召唤奥斯瓦尔德，将你所发现的猴子雕像告诉他

Text.en: You have spotted some monkey statues just ahead. Summon Oswald and speak to him for more information.
Text.zh: 你在前方不远处发现了一些猴子雕像。召唤奥斯瓦尔德，向他了解更多信息。

MapPinsText.en: Summon Oswald and speak to him about the monkey statues you have spotted
MapPinsText.zh: 召唤奥斯瓦尔德，将你所发现的猴子雕像告诉他

Text.en: Oswald has told you to keep a look out for buildings with Monkey statues on them. Search for The Molten Vault.
Text.zh: 奥斯瓦尔德请你留意那些带有猴子雕像的建筑。寻找熔火宝库。

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have helped the Hooded One reforge the Weapon. Tavakai has been cured but the search must continue.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你帮助兜帽密师重铸了武器。塔瓦凯已被治愈，但搜寻必须继续。

Text.en: Speak to the Hooded One.
Text.zh: 与兜帽密师交谈。

Text.en: Return to Kingsmarch.
Text.zh: 返回君锋镇。

Text.en: Witness Sin cure Tavakai and Makoru.
Text.zh: 见证罪治愈塔瓦凯和马克鲁

MapPinsText.en: Witness the Hooded One cure Tavakai and Makoru
MapPinsText.zh: 见证兜帽密师治愈塔瓦凯和马克鲁

Text.en: Defeat Tavakai.
Text.zh: 击败塔瓦凯。

Text.en: Find Tavakai.
Text.zh: 找到塔瓦凯。

Text.en: Enter the Heart of the Tribe.
Text.zh: 进入部族之心。

Message.en: Enter the Heart of the Tribe

MapPinsText.en: Enter the Heart of the Tribe

Text.en: Find the Heart of the Tribe.
Text.zh: 找到部族之心。

Message.en: Find the Heart of the Tribe

MapPinsText.en: Find the Heart of the Tribe

Text.en: Speak to Rhodri to sail to Ngakanu.
Text.zh: 与罗德里交谈，航行至纳卡努。

MapPinsText.en: Speak to Rhodri to sail to Ngakanu
MapPinsText.zh: 与罗德里交谈，航行至纳卡努

Text.en: Speak to Rhodri.
Text.zh: 与罗德里交谈。

Text.en: Return to Kingsmarch.
Text.zh: 返回君锋镇。

Text.en: Speak to The Hooded One.
Text.zh: 与兜帽密师交谈。

Text.en: Witness the Hooded One reforge the Weapon.
Text.zh: 见证兜帽密师重铸武器。

MapPinsText.en: Witness the Hooded One reforge the Weapon
MapPinsText.zh: 见证兜帽密师重铸武器

Text.en: Speak to Rhodri.
Text.zh: 与罗德里交谈。

Text.en: Return to Kingsmarch.
Text.zh: 返回君锋镇。

Text.en: Enter the Excavated Site.
Text.zh: 进入挖掘现场。

Text.en: Defeat Benedictus, First Herald of Utopia.
Text.zh: 击败本尼迪克图斯,乌托邦首席使徒。

Message.en: Defeat Benedictus, First Herald of Utopia
Message.zh: 击败本尼迪克图斯,乌托邦首席使徒

MapPinsText.en: Defeat Benedictus, First Herald of Utopia
MapPinsText.zh: 击败本尼迪克图斯,乌托邦首席使徒

Text.en: Confront Kanu and the First Herald.
Text.zh: 面对卡努和首席使徒。

Message.en: Confront Kanu and the First Herald

MapPinsText.en: Confront Kanu and the First Herald

Text.en: Search for a way to reforge the Weapon.
Text.zh: 找到重铸武器的方法。

Message.en: Search for a way to reforge the Weapon

MapPinsText.en: Search for a way to reforge the Weapon

Text.en: Enter the Excavation.
Text.zh: 进入挖掘场。

Text.en: Defeat Torvian, Hand of the Saviour.
Text.zh: 击败托维安,救世主之手。

Message.en: Defeat Torvian, Hand of the Saviour
Message.zh: 击败托维安,救世主之手。

MapPinsText.en: Defeat Torvian, Hand of the Saviour
MapPinsText.zh: 击败托维安,救世主之手。

Text.en: Search for a way to reforge the Weapon.
Text.zh: 找到重铸武器的方法。

Message.en: Search for a way to reforge the Weapon

MapPinsText.en: Search for a way to reforge the Weapon

Text.en: Survive the ambush.
Text.zh: 挺过伏击。

Text.en: Attack and destroy the forcefield.
Text.zh: 攻击并摧毁力场。

Text.en: Investigate the commotion outside the church.
Text.zh: 调查教堂外的骚动。

MapPinsText.en: Investigate the commotion outside the church

Text.en: Follow the Preacher.
Text.zh: 跟随教士。

Text.en: Ask someone about the Weapon.
Text.zh: 向人打听武器的消息。

Text.en: Travel to Arastas.
Text.zh: 前往阿拉斯塔。

Text.en: The Hooded One has suggested that you should speak to Makoru and pay close attention in order to determine where you should travel to next in search of the final weapon piece.
Text.zh: 兜帽密师建议你与马克鲁好好谈谈，以确定接下来应该前往何处寻找最后一块武器碎片。

Text.en: The Hooded One has suggested that you should speak to Makoru in Kingsmarch and pay close attention in order to determine where you should travel to next in search of the final weapon piece.
Text.zh: 兜帽密师建议你与君锋镇的马克鲁好好谈谈，以确定接下来应该前往何处寻找最后一块武器碎片。

MapPinsText.zh: 前往君锋镇，与马克鲁交谈

Text.en: Speak to the Hooded One.
Text.zh: 与兜帽密师交谈。

Text.en: You have obtained all weapon pieces. Return to Kingsmarch and speak to The Hooded One.
Text.zh: 你获得了一块武器碎片。返回君锋镇，与兜帽密师交谈。

MapPinsText.en: Speak to The Hooded One in Kingsmarch
MapPinsText.zh: 和君锋镇的兜帽密师对话

Text.en: You have summoned The Hooded One and notified them of the weapon piece. Watch as they gather it.
Text.zh: 你召唤了兜帽密师，并告知他武器碎片的下落。见证他收集碎片。

Text.en: You have summoned The Hooded One and notified them of the weapon piece. Watch as they gather it.

Text.en: You have obtained a weapon piece. Speak to Makoru to travel to a new island.
Text.zh: 你获得了一块武器碎片。与马克鲁交谈，前往新的岛屿。

MapPinsText.zh: 探索群岛，寻找另一块武器碎片

Text.en: Speak to the Hooded One.
Text.zh: 与兜帽密师交谈。

Text.en: You have obtained two weapon pieces. Speak to Makoru to travel to a new island.
Text.zh: 你获得了两块武器碎片。与马克鲁交谈，前往新的岛屿。

MapPinsText.en: Explore the Islands in search of the final Weapon Piece
MapPinsText.zh: 探索群岛，寻找最后的武器碎片

Text.zh: 探索群岛，寻找武器碎片。

MapPinsText.en: Explore the Islands in search of Weapon Pieces
MapPinsText.zh: 探索群岛，寻找武器碎片

Text.en: Makoru can take you wherever you'd like to go. Pick an island and set sail.
Text.zh: 不管你想去哪里，马克鲁都能带你抵达。挑一座岛扬帆起航吧。

MapPinsText.en: Talk to Makoru to set sail
MapPinsText.zh: 与马克鲁交谈并扬帆起航

Text.en: Speak to Makoru to hire her ship.
Text.zh: 与马克鲁交谈并雇佣她的船。

MapPinsText.en: Talk to Makoru about hiring a ship
MapPinsText.zh: 与马克鲁交谈并雇佣一条船

Text.en: Rog is offering you a Boat Charter. Take it and show it to Makoru to gain access to the ship.
Text.zh: 罗格给了你一份租船许可证，向马克鲁出示并解锁船只。

Message.en: Take the Boat Charter from Rog
Message.zh: 拿取罗格的租船许可证

MapPinsText.en: Take the Boat Charter from Rog
MapPinsText.zh: 拿取罗格的租船许可证

Text.en: Speak to Alva about selling your artefacts.
Text.zh: 与阿尔瓦谈谈出售神器的事情。

Text.en: Doryani has told you about the search that you must undertake. Meet up with Alva to find out about hiring a ship.
Text.zh: 多里亚尼介绍了你即将踏上的搜寻之旅。与阿尔瓦会面了解如何雇佣船只。

Text.en: You have arrived in Kingsmarch. Talk to Doryani to learn more about why you've come here.
Text.zh: 你抵达了君锋镇。与多里亚尼交谈，了解来到这里的目的。

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have passed Tawhoa's Test and have been rewarded justly.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你通过了塔赫亚的考验，并获得了对应奖励。

Text.en: Use the Tattoo of Tawhoa.
Text.zh: 使用塔赫亚的文身。

Text.en: Use the Tattoo of Tawhoa.
Text.zh: 使用塔赫亚的文身。

Text.en: Take a Reward from Navali.
Text.zh: 从娜瓦莉处领取奖赏。

Text.en: Turn in the Blank Tattoo of Tawhoa to Navali.
Text.zh: 将塔赫亚的空白文身交给娜瓦莉。

Message.en: Turn in the Blank Tattoo of Tawhoa
Message.zh: 将塔赫亚的空白文身交出

MapPinsText.zh: 将塔赫亚的空白文身交给娜瓦莉

Text.en: Take a Reward from the Hinekora Totem.
Text.zh: 从辛格拉图腾处领取奖励。

MapPinsText.en: Take a Reward from the Hinekora Totem
MapPinsText.zh: 从辛格拉图腾处领取奖励

MapPinsText.zh: 拾取塔赫亚的空白文身

Text.zh: 完成塔赫亚的考验。

Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你通过了塔萨里奥的考验，并获得了对应奖励。

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have passed Ngamahu's Test and have been rewarded justly.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你通过了努葛玛呼的考验，并获得了对应奖励。

Text.en: Use the Tattoo of Ngamahu.
Text.zh: 使用努葛玛呼的文身

Text.en: Use the Tattoo of Ngamahu.
Text.zh: 使用努葛玛呼的文身

Text.zh: 从娜瓦莉处领取奖赏。

Text.zh: 将努葛玛呼的空白文身交给娜瓦莉。

Text.zh: 从辛格拉图腾处领取奖励。
