MapPinsText.zh: 拾取努葛玛呼的空白文身

Text.en: Complete Ngamahu's Test.
Text.zh: 完成努葛玛呼的考验。

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have killed The Scourge of the Skies.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你已经击败了天空灾星。

Text.en: You have found the Scourge of the Skies. Slay it.
Text.zh: 你已经找到了天空灾星。击败它。

Message.en: Kill the Scourge of the Skies

MapPinsText.en: Kill the Scourge of the Skies

Text.en: Explore Shrike Island.
Text.zh: 探索百舌岛。

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have slain Krutog.
Text.zh: 任务完成——你已击败克鲁托格。

Text.en: Slay Krutog, the Kin Tyrant.
Text.zh: 击败族裔暴君克鲁托格

Text.en: You have found Volcanic Warrens on the Isle of Kin. Explore them.
Text.zh: 你在亲眷岛发现了熔火院落。探索熔火院落。

Text.en: Enter the Volcanic Warrens.
Text.zh: 进入熔火院落。

Text.en: There is something dark at the heart of the Isle of Kin. Search it for an answer.
Text.zh: 亲眷岛深处潜藏黑暗。探索亲眷岛，寻找答案。

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have explored Arastas and have found nothing of interest... for now.
Text.zh: 任务完成——你已探索阿拉斯塔，但是没什么发现……目前还没有。

Text.en: Explore Arastas.
Text.zh: 探索阿拉斯塔。

Text.en: Travel to Arastas.
Text.zh: 前往阿拉斯塔。

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have slain Diamora.
Text.zh: 任务完成——你已击败戴娅摩菈。

Text.en: You have encountered a Siren within the Singing Caverns! Kill her immediately.
Text.zh: 你在冥曲洞窟深处遭遇了一名海妖！快击败她！

MapPinsText.zh: 击败葬歌之声, 戴娅摩菈

Text.en: Something is very wrong within this island's secret cave. Explore it in search of an answer.
Text.zh: 这座岛的秘密洞窟非常诡异，深入探索查明真相。

Text.en: Enter the Singing Caverns.
Text.zh: 进入冥曲洞窟。

Text.en: This island seems to be quite lush. Explore Whakapanu Island.
Text.zh: 这座岛草木繁茂，郁郁葱葱。探索瓦卡帕努岛。

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have slain the Prisoner.
Text.zh: 任务完成——你已击败囚徒。

Text.en: The Prisoner has been held here for centuries. Kill him... if you can.
Text.zh: 囚徒已经被困在这里不知道多少年月了。击败他……但你行吗？

Text.en: Open the Fortified Door.
Text.zh: 打开加固门。

Text.en: Something dark is hidden at the heart of this place. Find it.
Text.zh: 这个地方的核心深处潜藏着某种黑暗。找到它。

Text.en: Enter Solitary Confinement.
Text.zh: 进入遗世监禁。

Text.en: You have found a prison built by the Eternal Empire. Something is very wrong here. Explore it in search of an answer.
Text.zh: 你找到了一处永恒帝国建立的牢狱。这里的情况非常古怪，深入探索寻找真相。

Text.en: Use a Ballista.
Text.zh: 使用弩炮。

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have obtained a Shark Fin for Kaimana and have been given a reward for your aid.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你为凯玛纳获得了一块鲨鱼鳍，她给了你一份奖励。

Text.en: Use Kaom's Lesson to receive his Blessing.
Text.zh: 使用岗姆的训诫来接受他的祝福。

MapPinsText.en: Use Kaom's Lesson to receive his Blessing
MapPinsText.zh: 使用岗姆的训诫来接受他的祝福

Text.en: Use Rakiata's Lesson to receive her Blessing.
Text.zh: 使用拉其塔的训诫来接受她的祝福。

MapPinsText.en: Use Rakiata's Lesson to receive her Blessing
MapPinsText.zh: 使用拉其塔的训诫来接受她的祝福

Text.en: As a token of her gratitude, Kaimana has offered you a reward for bringing her a Shark Fin. Take a reward from her in Kingsmarch.
Text.zh: 为了感谢你带来了鲨鱼鳍，凯玛纳给了你一份奖励。前往君锋镇收下她的奖励。

MapPinsText.en: Take a Reward from Kaimana in Kingsmarch
MapPinsText.zh: 返回君锋镇，从凯玛纳处领取奖励

Text.en: As a token of her gratitude, Kaimana has offered you a reward for bringing her a Shark Fin. Take a reward from her.
Text.zh: 为了感谢你带来了鲨鱼鳍，凯玛纳给了你一份奖励。收下她的奖励。

Text.en: Await Kaimana's return to Kingsmarch.
Text.zh: 等待凯玛纳返回君锋镇。

Message.zh: 等待凯玛纳返回君锋镇

MapPinsText.zh: 等待凯玛纳返回君锋镇

Text.en: You have obtained the Shark Fin that Kaimana requested. Return it to her in Kingsmarch.
Text.zh: 你获得了凯玛纳需要的鲨鱼鳍。返回君锋镇交差。

Message.zh: 前往君锋镇，返回凯玛纳处

MapPinsText.zh: 前往君锋镇，返回凯玛纳处

Text.en: You have obtained the Shark Fin that Kaimana requested. Return it to her in Ngakanu.
Text.zh: 你获得了凯玛纳需要的鲨鱼鳍。返回纳卡努交差。

Message.zh: 返回纳卡努寻找凯玛纳

MapPinsText.zh: 返回纳卡努寻找凯玛纳

Text.en: Find a use for the Shark Fin.
Text.zh: 探寻鲨鱼鳍的用途。

Message.en: Find a use for the Shark Fin

MapPinsText.en: Find a use for the Shark Fin

Text.en: You have defeated the Great White One. Pick up its Shark Fin.
Text.zh: 你击败了巨白鲨。拾取它的鲨鱼鳍。

Text.en: Defeat the Great White One for its Shark Fin.
Text.zh: 击败巨白鲨，夺取它的鲨鱼鳍。

Text.en: Explore Whakapanu Island in search of a Shark Fin.
Text.zh: 探索瓦卡帕努岛，寻找鲨鱼鳍。

Text.en: Kaimana has requested that you obtain a Shark Fin. Travel to Whakapanu Island and search for one.
Text.zh: 凯玛纳请你替她寻找一块鲨鱼鳍。前往瓦卡帕努岛展开搜索。

Text.en: Speak to Kaimana.
Text.zh: 与凯玛纳交谈。

Text.en: Explore Ngakanu.
Text.zh: 探索纳卡努。

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have survived the mist and slain Omniphobia, Fear Manifest.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你在迷雾中幸存了下来，并击败了具象恐惧昂尼弗比亚。

Text.en: Use the Mist-shrouded Tome.
Text.zh: 使用迷雾之书

Text.en: Tujen is offering you rewards for helping clear the mists.
Text.zh: 你帮助驱散了迷雾，图金愿意奖励你的功劳。

Text.en: Tujen is offering you a reward for helping clear the mists.
Text.zh: 你帮助驱散了迷雾，图金愿意奖励你的功劳。

Text.en: Speak to Tujen in Kingsmarch.
Text.zh: 在君锋镇与图金交谈。

Text.en: Freya Hartlin was not all that she appeared to be. Survive the madness.
Text.zh: 芙蕾雅·哈特林并非她的外表所示。从疯狂中幸存下来。

Text.en: Use the runed Verisium spikes to free Freya Hartlin.
Text.zh: 使用维金符文钉子，释放芙蕾雅·哈特林。

Text.en: Dannig has forged the Verisium Ingots you found into runed spikes that can hopefully release Freya Hartlin from her trap at Journey's End. Bring them to her.
Text.zh: 丹宁将你找到的维金锭锻造成了符文钉子，它们也许能将旅途终点的芙蕾雅·哈特林从陷阱里救出来。快把它们带去。

Text.en: Dannig has forged the Verisium Ingots you found into Verisium Spikes that can hopefully release Freya Hartlin from her trap at Journey's End. Take them from him.
Text.zh: 丹宁将你找到的维金锭锻造成了维金长钉，它们也许能将旅途终点的芙蕾雅·哈特林从陷阱里救出来。取走钉子。

Message.en: Take the Verisium Spikes from Dannig
Message.zh: 从丹宁处拿取维金长钉

MapPinsText.en: Take the Verisium Spikes from Dannig
MapPinsText.zh: 从丹宁处拿取维金长钉

Text.en: You have found the Verisium Ingots needed to release Freya from her trap. Take them to Dannig in Kingsmarch.
Text.zh: 你找到了从陷阱中救出芙蕾雅所需的维金锭。把它们带给君锋镇的丹宁。

Message.en: Bring the Verisium Ingots to Dannig

MapPinsText.en: Bring the Verisium Ingots to Dannig

Text.en: Captain Hartlin is dead, but you have found the Verisium Ingots needed to release Freya from her trap. Pick them up.
Text.zh: 哈特林船长丧命了，但你找到了从陷阱中救出芙蕾雅所需的维金锭。拿走它们。

Text.en: Captain Hartlin has, unfortunately, died and become an undead horror. Slay him and put him out of his misery.
Text.zh: 哈特林船长不幸身亡，还变成了一个亡灵恐魔。击败他，让他能够脱离苦海。

Text.en: Find Captain Hartlin.
Text.zh: 去找哈特林船长。

Text.en: Speak to Tujen.
Text.zh: 与图金交谈。

Text.en: Summon Tujen.
Text.zh: 召唤图金。

Text.en: Explore Journey's End.
Text.zh: 探索旅途终点。

Text.en: Enter Journey's End.
Text.zh: 进入旅途终点。

Text.en: Something is very wrong on the mist-covered island. Explore in search of an answer.
Text.zh: 这座迷雾重重的小岛事有蹊跷，深入探索寻找真相。

Text.en: Speak to Makoru to travel to Kedge Bay.

Text.en: Explore the Cisterns.
Text.zh: 探索储水区。

Text.en: Enter the Cisterns.
Text.zh: 进入储水区。

Text.en: Explore the Slums.
Text.zh: 探索贫民窟。

Text.en: Enter the Slums.
Text.zh: 进入贫民窟。

Text.en: Speak to Cedrus.
Text.zh: 与瑟杜斯交谈。

Text.en: Enter the Rampart Encampment.
Text.zh: 进入城垒营房。

Text.en: You have defeated Sergeant Odyg. Proceed to the Rampart Encampment.
Text.zh: 你已击败奥迪格军士。前往城垒营房。

Text.en: Twilight Order soldiers have found Cedrus' safe place, but there's still a chance to stop them from telling the others. Kill Sergeant Odyg.
Text.zh: 暮光会的士兵已经发现了瑟杜斯的避风港，但还来得及在传出风声之前阻止他们。击败奥迪格军士。

Text.en: Cedrus claims he knows of a safe place. Locate the Rampart Encampment.
Text.zh: 瑟杜斯声称他知道一个安全的避风港。找到城垒营房。

Text.en: You have freed Cedrus. Speak to him to find out what happened.
Text.zh: 你解救了瑟杜斯。与他交谈，了解发生了什么。

Text.en: The Twilight Order has crucified someone, but he's still alive. Free him.
Text.zh: 暮光会正在对一个人行刑，但他一息尚存。解救他。

Text.en: You have finally set foot on the accursed island of Oriath. Find a safe place to operate from before the Twilight Order detects your presence.
Text.zh: 你终于踏上了被诅咒的奥瑞亚岛。寻找一个安全的地方展开行动，别让暮光会发现你的行踪。

MapPinsText.en: Explore the Harbour in search of a safe place to set up a base of operations
MapPinsText.zh: 探索港口，寻找安全的地方建立行动基地

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have restarted the Water Wheel and have been given a reward by Elwynian for your help.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你已重新启动水车，艾尔文尼安为感谢你的帮助，给了你一份奖励。

Text.en: Take the Reward from Elwynian.
Text.zh: 从艾尔文尼安处领取奖励。

Message.zh: 从艾尔文尼安处领取奖励

MapPinsText.zh: 从艾尔文尼安处领取奖励

Text.en: Return to Elwynian and let her know that the Water Wheel has been restarted and water should be flowing freely once again.
Text.zh: 返回并告知艾尔文尼安，水车已重新启动，水流应已恢复畅通。

Text.en: Destroy the Nests on the Water Wheel.
Text.zh: 摧毁水车上的巢穴。

MapPinsText.en: Destroy the Nests on the Water Wheel

Text.en: Locate the Water Wheel.
Text.zh: 找到水车。

Text.en: Enter the Cisterns.
Text.zh: 进入储水区。

Text.en: Elwynian has talked about an issue with the water supply. Make your way to the Cisterns to investigate.
Text.zh: 艾尔文尼安提及了供水异常的问题。前往储水区进行调查。

MapPinsText.en: Search the Cisterns past the Slums
MapPinsText.zh: 穿越贫民窟，搜寻储水区

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have defeated the one-eyed Gladiator and have been given a reward by Cedrus for your help.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你击败了独眼角斗士，瑟杜斯为感谢你的帮助，给了你一份奖励。

Text.en: Take a Reward from Cedrus.
Text.zh: 从瑟杜斯处领取奖励。

Text.en: Speak to Cedrus in Rampart Encampment.
Text.zh: 前往城垒营房与瑟杜斯交谈。

MapPinsText.en: Speak to Cedrus in Rampart Encampment

Text.en: Defeat Thag-Tror, the Mammoth.
Text.zh: 击败萨格托尔，猛犸象。

Text.en: Locate the one-eyed Gladiator.
Text.zh: 找到独眼角斗士。

Text.en: Enter the Gladiator's Arena.
Text.zh: 进入角斗士竞技场。

Text.en: Locate the Gladiator's Arena.
Text.zh: 找到角斗士竞技场。

Text.en: Travel to the Plaza of Patrons.
Text.zh: 前往主顾广场。

Defeat the Ritual Casters to Close the Portals
MapPinsText.zh: 击败仪式施法者以关闭传送门

MapPinsText.en: Disable the Crystals before time runs out
MapPinsText.zh: 在时间耗尽前关闭水晶

MapPinsText.en: Find and Defeat all the Rare Monsters
MapPinsText.zh: 寻找并击败所有稀有怪物

Message.en: Trial Failed from too much Ruin
Message.zh: 积累过多摧灭而导致试炼失败

Message.en: Trial Ended from taking Rewards Early
Message.zh: 提前领取奖励而导致试炼结束

MapPinsText.en: Sacrifice Monsters to the Altar by slaying them in the Blood Circles
MapPinsText.zh: 在赤红法阵中击败怪物，将它们奉献给在灵殿

Text.en: Quest Complete - You have completed the Trialmaster's Challenges and have earned 2 Ascendancy Points.
Text.zh: 任务完成 - 你完成了试炼使者的挑战，并获得了 2 点升华点数。

Text.en: Enter The Trial of Chaos and complete the Trialmaster's Challenges.
Text.zh: 进入混沌试炼，完成试炼使者的挑战。

Text.en: Place the Inscribed Ultimatum in the Temple Offering to undertake the Trialmaster's Challenges.
Text.zh: 将贪婪战书放入神殿奉献台中，接受试炼使者的挑战。

Message.en: Place the Inscribed Ultimatum in the Temple Offering
Message.zh: 将贪婪战书放入神殿奉献台中

MapPinsText.en: Place the Inscribed Ultimatum in the Temple Offering

Text.en: You've found the Temple of Chaos. Find a use for the Inscribed Ultimatum.
Text.zh: 你找到了混沌大殿。找到贪婪战书的用途。

Message.en: Find a use for the Inscribed Ultimatum

MapPinsText.en: Find a use for the Inscribed Ultimatum

Text.en: Bring the Inscribed Ultimatum to the Temple of Chaos to participate in a Trial of Chaos.
Text.zh: 将贪婪战书带到混沌大殿，开启混沌试炼。

Message.en: Travel to the Temple of Chaos

MapPinsText.en: Travel to the Temple of Chaos

Text.zh: 任务完成 - 瓦尔克拉斯摆脱了第一律令的威胁。
